| We are thrilled to report that our new organization - CAVPAC - is off to a remarkable start. **We have already heard from TENS OF THOUSANDS of Americans who support our mission of championing American values, and we 're just getting started.**

I'm traveling all around the country to help Republican candidates win up and down the ballot. We are seeing a strong response from grassroots conservatives in all fifty states, and thousands are signing up to volunteer, donate and support our mission. _It is clear: our message and our values are resonating, and we must keep up the momentum._

CAVPAC is focused on promoting conservative ideas and defending America against the onslaught of liberal ideology being pushed into our homes, schools and places of worship. Let's be clear: **_the Democrats in power are doing everything to destroy our America First agenda._** The radical Left works against our shared values and everything that America truly stands for.

_The work we are doing is so incredibly important._ We must keep up the momentum, so we're requesting your assistance. If you're able, we could really use a **[quick donation](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d86d51c616e5427385f7b72d7fca0eef&_e=f0Dzq508s6NzjN7ioWN1KAO088RMEcXliAOv8ilXOBNKnkCegIWIKHmCmd3C30qELbtKsamppluPkAjbjq8BPWmVrq2p5g_DmRxecJgOkL9DaPkmONF3wP8Z3a1XI9M_NrbKBLST3aOiCMeBTsExK5CsNGKFNpf4RhKXIoeNJrnQtBt2Cw7NbvGD54iIdUf5n0dAo07kOGD8cQ5hwG0qRvjAy15A1VG9cH4HOLyr1UMcAsutTPiUgdWnbDpVbs1rsnFItoGAaKeYt2mtugPBss2MN2LGDh4Lnw_2E41WTBCLz5jbVjw1hijtYdLnEuwskOohPaJf97UwSsDi5FfnsdYsvCqnTJZIfayM0YtM4yw0Af_de3IjqqX4VTuK6jNq_dh4eLDxFvFmThLJPAsFfASMVxOQmdOfGTtIN9K1Y7Akm944coChuHLS8YXFaVNA3peOCLOVubDgw3huy13uPTDaY7ecOcx3S5kmyBdWgRNHKAJFnuW2SMguz1RMENyO "quick donation")** , no matter how large or small, to send a loud message to the radical Left.
_**[HELP KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM](http://links.standingstrongamerica.com/u/click?_t=29c3b6e742c849fabbcc130432510e66&_m=d86d51c616e5427385f7b72d7fca0eef&_e=f0Dzq508s6NzjN7ioWN1KAO088RMEcXliAOv8ilXOBNKnkCegIWIKHmCmd3C30qELbtKsamppluPkAjbjq8BPWmVrq2p5g_DmRxecJgOkL9DaPkmONF3wP8Z3a1XI9M_NrbKBLST3aOiCMeBTsExK5CsNGKFNpf4RhKXIoeNJrnQtBt2Cw7NbvGD54iIdUf5n0dAo07kOGD8cQ5hwG0qRvjAy15A1VG9cH4HOLyr1UMcAsutTPiUgdWnbDpVbs1rsnFItoGAaKeYt2mtugPBsnPHWuEbI8P0Fuhe_4vk-sTf2tQEX3tBXRAajsI3rRvu5Os_TFLyGXRdac3dMlvI5F4AVYMMbQGCz3KlF09FiVRXzPGLAp_cvc3kL8JCT7xbt3TX0UGI0u92Gr1BtVitYwDdp9uXUKfFCK4Jg1d3UktYQ_OlYOcVDo5_Z1z6r51PxhQliRryJomJtslTiy5IqIVrs7WhOzICOYGpr5P_aGOqCbFXJGhTjQTQlnR-J4la "HELP KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM")**_

Now is the time to make our bold statement that Americans are ready and excited to take their country back by supporting CAVPAC.

CAVPAC is on the frontlines of helping win back the House and the Senate in the 2022 midterms, but we need to make sure we have the financial resources to be successful.

Thank you for your continued dedication to championing our American values.

clean_body: | | | | | | We are thrilled to report that our new organization - CAVPAC - is off to a remarkable start. We have already heard from TENS OF THOUSANDS of Americans who support our mission of championing American values, and we 're just getting started. I'm traveling all around the country to help Republican candidates win up and down the ballot. We are seeing a strong response from grassroots conservatives in all fifty states, and thousands are signing up to volunteer, donate and support our mission. It is clear: our message and our values are resonating, and we must keep up the momentum. CAVPAC is focused on promoting conservative ideas and defending America against the onslaught of liberal ideology being pushed into our homes, schools and places of worship. Let's be clear: the Democrats in power are doing everything to destroy our America First agenda. The radical Left works against our shared values and everything that America truly stands for. The work we are doing is so incredibly important. We must keep up the momentum, so we're requesting your assistance. If you're able, we could really use a "quick donation" , no matter how large or small, to send a loud message to the radical Left. "HELP KEEP UP THE MOMENTUM" | | | Now is the time to make our bold statement that Americans are ready and excited to take their country back by supporting CAVPAC. CAVPAC is on the frontlines of helping win back the House and the Senate in the 2022 midterms, but we need to make sure we have the financial resources to be successful. Thank you for your continued dedication to championing our American values. | Mike Pompeo | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. name: Mike Pompeo
subject: I’ve upset the “woke” mob
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES
body:
|
| | | | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b413fe3eaa7e469ea539136e07dd3500&_e=gBNoemgfOpFb9vn6jylyIGhVi6MPsHHnsr9tiqUQ_7dCXWeMptW62nhpYR4CZ57VMS5NpAaPBPEiCmnBjradJuFfeFqDNQDsHLsjuAjSKIdi7IVnZq2Rr8ssFSd1iDwdQPuoMv3NU9d2VPP2ATtgwcwQvk2kznmpdc7dFzKy-Xm6pTQAqU5oVSnAdDGBr_3ykPwf_uJZxow6-m-0MQ7nXc-f_m-fXLrvCMxp_lv9wkmWfFC30pCc_o5AeLKEdSwNDDP3E5t9mg8Brt_NXMk7YobFAFqo7_0QSK5mSHB1jVYAJC_EGf_PPr_Sh7_mHEd1F5WftXhxJ_rYuMulyDGSHmRjXJAQhy88FMhfwV9gjUEmwlvWUCj2KanQdIgPdLrLojYJzn2RcQUkxf9rSjpccnGu8i1z0VFa4_PBp_JHV_16L24EqFuHv-C3DtuQv9ptYoZInK1KkRtce8uv7ubTRaAGXSMSoRV60CCOhHmtwejmhdqilcRsyklX-SJ_ocMI5sD8OwFW8FYcvcQF7vN88Q%3D%3D)
---
Growing up in the American education system, I was always taught to be proud of our country. In fact, it's what inspired me to attend West Point and later serve in the Army. I saw the importance of protecting and promoting our freedoms both at home and abroad, first as a young officer patrolling the Iron Curtain, and later as a member of Congress, Director of the CIA and the 70th Secretary of State. These experiences reminded me that America is the greatest country on Earth.

Today's children are learning the opposite lessons. Right now, in classrooms across the country, they are being taught that America is a fundamentally evil country. Instead of appreciating our differences, the Left is telling students that our founding principles - that all people are created equal - are inherently corrupt. This goes against our core American values that so many have fought to protect.

_**Let me be clear: Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project have no place in our classrooms. This is nothing more than an attempt to further divide our country.**_

Don't allow the Left to indoctrinate the next generation of Americans.

I've publicly denounced Critical Race Theory, and it seems I've struck a nerve with the "woke" mob. Members of the Fake News media like CNN's Chris Cuomo and Hollywood elites like John Legend are attacking me for speaking out against Critical Race Theory.

That's why I'm reaching out to you. Do you support Critical Race Theory and teaching children that America is an evil and racist country?**[If not, I need you to help me fight back!](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b413fe3eaa7e469ea539136e07dd3500&_e=gBNoemgfOpFb9vn6jylyIGhVi6MPsHHnsr9tiqUQ_7dCXWeMptW62nhpYR4CZ57VMS5NpAaPBPEiCmnBjradJuFfeFqDNQDsHLsjuAjSKIdi7IVnZq2Rr8ssFSd1iDwdQPuoMv3NU9d2VPP2ATtgwcwQvk2kznmpdc7dFzKy-Xm6pTQAqU5oVSnAdDGBr_3ykPwf_uJZxow6-m-0MQ7nXc-f_m-fXLrvCMxp_lv9wkmWfFC30pCc_o5AeLKEdSwNDDP3E5t9mg8Brt_NXMk7YobFAFqo7_0QSK5mSHB1jVbox-we8VrMj8tdSvggPcLdqeryESXOtWWbyXSy7jZvbPq4e3aXyO9DSHtYI5Un0jPNRoyWCf8gmEJfs0oIZg7Bb28jfGrc5ummNCC8GYdb1AFD9jb2dONuge1IaEE2126yA5oNY8f9XV9AAFTVGsUZ6WtfPPkh_3RDynkg6JaYk6ThNQxn7NX64_q_dXieSPRIJpvxxBrvtblcGsOY8-3Z3Vz6fOSP9frNWw4gT4cK6w%3D%3D "If not, I need you to help me fight back!")**
---
| | [](http://links.bestamericanow.com/u/click?_t=f6e78b69acbb4291bd75bc93fae35a62&_m=b413fe3eaa7e469ea539136e07dd3500&_e=gBNoemgfOpFb9vn6jylyIGhVi6MPsHHnsr9tiqUQ_7dCXWeMptW62nhpYR4CZ57VMS5NpAaPBPEiCmnBjradJuFfeFqDNQDsHLsjuAjSKIdi7IVnZq2Rr8ssFSd1iDwdQPuoMv3NU9d2VPP2ATtgwcwQvk2kznmpdc7dFzKy-Xm6pTQAqU5oVSnAdDGBr_3ykPwf_uJZxow6-m-0MQ7nXc-f_m-fXLrvCMxp_lv9wkmWfFC30pCc_o5AeLKEdSwNDDP3E5t9mg8Brt_NXMk7YobFAFqo7_0QSK5mSHB1jVZBPUXRa7V2R3rgxFliMXN7TdSJ-ZRove8p--c2c3DHu6iBGgBPtOUc_6bHqzKo7fFhrTCcTKEBnCwIHOWl95SpxCGrpnQqUL-sJC79cZZCB7PZIsxbJWLrIGT7DXa49_LowmZaAWZuJOoBpQ4URHNJBVUbjhZZYgf6F2uOiVA-_X2HLi4sfGtQdDk-91PF2_L33CPkXCgixxm-yYT0opyV0oJjF2DPd4UOE-d1cYQUSQ%3D%3D)
---
Through my CAVPAC organization, I'm doing everything in my power to champion our American values and stand up to the radical Left. We need to elect more principled leaders across the country who are proud to be an American and who won't give in to pressure from the "woke" mob.

I worry that if our children are taught to see each other for our differences instead of what brings us together, adversaries like the Chinese Communist Party will undermine what makes our country so special. _We cannot allow these attempts to divide our country prevail._

With your help and support, we can stop Critical Race Theory and champion our _**American**_ values.

Unapologetically American,
---

I saw the importance of protecting and promoting our freedoms both at home and abroad, first as a young officer patrolling the Iron Curtain, and later as a member of Congress, Director of the CIA and the 70th Secretary of State. These experiences reminded me that America is the greatest country on Earth. Today's children are learning the opposite lessons. Right now, in classrooms across the country, they are being taught that America is a fundamentally evil country. Instead of appreciating our differences, the Left is telling students that our founding principles - that all people are created equal - are inherently corrupt. This goes against our core American values that so many have fought to protect. Let me be clear: Critical Race Theory and the 1619 Project have no place in our classrooms. This is nothing more than an attempt to further divide our country. Don't allow the Left to indoctrinate the next generation of Americans. I've publicly denounced Critical Race Theory, and it seems I've struck a nerve with the "woke" mob. Members of the Fake News media like CNN's Chris Cuomo and Hollywood elites like John Legend are attacking me for speaking out against Critical Race Theory. That's why I'm reaching out to you. Do you support Critical Race Theory and teaching children that America is an evil and racist country? "If not, I need you to help me fight back!" | | Through my CAVPAC organization, I'm doing everything in my power to champion our American values and stand up to the radical Left. We need to elect more principled leaders across the country who are proud to be an American and who won't give in to pressure from the "woke" mob. I worry that if our children are taught to see each other for our differences instead of what brings us together, adversaries like the Chinese Communist Party will undermine what makes our country so special. We cannot allow these attempts to divide our country prevail. With your help and support, we can stop Critical Race Theory and champion our American values. Unapologetically American, | Mike Pompeo | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR CANDIDATE’S COMMITTEE. PO BOX 2485 SPRINGFIELD, VA 22152 Don't want to receive any more of our emails? .

name: Glenn Grothman
subject: Super-Size the IRS??
body:
[](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clkva-yddjllujiu-r/) Fellow Patriot,I've spent my days in Washington working to **STOP the IRS.** So when Joe Biden proposed giving them **$80 billion **in new taxpayer money, I jumped into action.First, the role of government shouldn't be taking as much as possible from taxpayers. Second, the IRS has NOT proven that they deserve our trust, much less our money - not with their selective enforcement of laws and history of targeting conservative groups. [JOIN ME - Say NO to the IRS!](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clkva-yddjllujiu-y/) [](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clkva-yddjllujiu-t/) We should NOT super-size the IRS.Honestly, I can't even believe this is an issue in Washington right now. Joe Biden has created enough crises that we need to focus on fixing - a crisis on the border, rampant crime in our cities (thanks to de-funding the police), inflation, gas prices... and the list goes on! **Why would the solution to ANY of that be giving the IRS more money?** [STAND WITH GROTHMAN: DONATE $25 >>>](https://glenngrothmanforcongress.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clkva-yddjllujiu-i/) I am asking you to help FIGHT BACK and end Biden's super-sized attack on American taxpayers. name: Scott Fitzgerald
subject: Runaway Democrats... Again!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress
body:
(How well is it working out for them?) In ten years, the Democrats' playbook hasn't changed much.I was there ten years ago in Wisconsin, when the Democrats fled our state to try to block a bill they didn't agree with.It didn't work then, of course - we stayed, did our job, and passed our historic bill and even more important legislation while they were gone... then we crushed them in the recall elections.And now, in Texas, Democrats once again fled their state (this time with a selfie-filled private plane and luxury coach buses to Washington, D.C.) to block a bill they don't like - this time over **election integrity in Texas. ** **Peter we need to tell the Democrats to [DO THEIR JOBS](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-r/) and PASS election integrity!** [ADD YOUR NAME - "DO YOUR JOB" Texas Petition!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-y/) It's unbelievable how far the Democrats will go to pretend there isn't a problem with our elections.America _**deserves**_ to know that our elections - the foundation of our democracy - are being run clean of fraud. But instead, the Democrats scramble to block every attempt at Voter ID and clean elections. They even ran the All-Star Game out of Georgia when their laws weren't "woke" enough! The Democrats need to DO THEIR JOBS and help end voter fraud, not stand in the way. [Click here if you agree with me!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-j/) [Add your name - Help clean up our elections!](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-t/) Thanks,
Scott Fitzgerald [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-h/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-k/) [](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-u/)[](https://scottfitzgerald.cmail19.com/t/t-l-clueul-ahkdjtlkr-o/) | Paid for by Scott Fitzgerald for Congress

subject: A recycled, 40-year political insider
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY YOUNGKIN FOR GOVERNOR INC
body:
I officially have a corrupt Democratic opponent: Terry McAuliffe

| [](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58436826:shGH0adNU:m:1:1155937413:BAB17556E2DE3D32FE663DFC99948725:r)
---

Friend,

I officially have a corrupt Democratic opponent: **_Terry McAuliffe._**

And honestly, I welcome the **Politician from the Past** who already had his chance and failed the Commonwealth.

McAuliffe will default to the same political games he and all his Democratic allies have been playing for years. We need strong leadership in the Commonwealth that will reignite our economy, restore excellence in our schools, and re-establish our commitment to public safety.

**_[Now that I have a 40-year political insider and failed career politician running against me, I will need support from the people.](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58436826:shGH0adNU:m:1:1155937413:BAB17556E2DE3D32FE663DFC99948725:r)_** | [**DEFEAT MCAULIFFE**](http://email.granitelists.com/ct/58436827:shGH0adNU:m:1:1155937413:BAB17556E2DE3D32FE663DFC99948725:r)
---

Virginia needs a Governor who will bring the people together and make Virginia the best place to work, raise our children, and prosper together.

**This will be a tough race to win, and corrupt Democrats are going to do everything they can to keep the Governor's mansion. I am going to need your support.**

name: Senator Josh Hawley
subject: 3 Reasons to keep fighting the Left
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JOSH HAWLEY FOR SENATE**
body:
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "radical left") Peter, The radical left has decided that America is broken beyond repair and that it needs to be torn down and rebuilt as a socialist nation - with them at the top. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "Tweet")They are happy to see our border overrun, our communities mired in crime and our children indoctrinated with Critical Race Theory that will teach them lies and encourage them to hate one another. When Joe Biden seeks to appoint cabinet members or other administration officials who have championed those divisive ideologies, I've worked hard to oppose their Senate Confirmation and ensured my colleagues knew the truth about the individual sitting before us at those hearings. [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "Headline")He appoints criminals to the cabinet and allows our cities to crumble just to appease his liberal base. Then, he will sell out your family to stay in power. **These people are dangerous radicals - one was a part of an eco-terrorist organization, and the Labor Secretary had two of his aides convicted of extortion while he was a Mayor of Boston.** I am fighting every day to stop Biden and his radical friends from deconstructing our nation, but I can see now that the fight will be long. **[I need to know you will stand by my side and will continue to support my efforts.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "I need to know you will stand by my
side and will continue to support my efforts.")** The radical left's tactics are insidious:
* They cheered as BLM and Antifa **_burned American cities_** last summer, then they **_defunded_** the police even in the face of a spiking crime rate.
* They **_opened the border_** to allow the drug cartels and terrorists free access to our streets.
* Now they want to **_teach_** your children that they are inherently racist and can only be saved by liberal policies.
* They even **_defamed_** our nation on the 4th of July.

They are escalating their attempts to destroy our great nation, and we need to step up the fight. While you're enjoying a summer of freedom, they are working to fund their pet projects in the name of "infrastructure," and want us to believe that cash for illegal aliens, Medicare for all, defunding the police or Green New Deal style policies will help our nation's economy recover. Quite the opposite. Those policies will destroy our nation and that's why I'm not taking a day off. **These radical leftists know I see them for what they are, and that makes me a target. It 's why they keep trying to cancel me.** **[Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or more so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929288:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "Will you please make your most generous contribution of $50 or
more so I have what I need to keep going? Any amount, from $5 to the Federal Maximum of $2,900, is greatly appreciated.")** [](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "Family")Joe Biden isn't going to stop them. Quite the opposite; he's encouraging them. But unlike Biden, I've got three good reasons to keep fighting against the radical left agenda in Washington, and these three motivate me to ensure I succeed. So, every day, you can count on me to be a thorn in the side of the Biden Administration and do my part to keep America the greatest country on earth, where we embrace Independence Day and thank our Founding Fathers for standing up to tyranny, even when it cost most of them everything they held dear. I'm still fighting. **[Will you help me succeed?](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "Will you help me succeed?")** For America,
[](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "Josh Hawley") Josh Hawley
U.S. Senator, Missouri | | [STAND WITH JOSH](http://asg.vervemail9.com/ct/57929287:6SlFtPlNb:m:1:3103520637:DB27522F75135DB691CBBE8634F971E5:r "STAND WITH JOSH")
---

body:

|

| | **[I'm honored to have Congresswoman Kathy Castor's endorsement in my race for governor. She's made Florida proud during her time in Congress, including her recent appointment to lead the Select Committee on the Climate Crisis. Kathy's proven that she cares about protecting Florida's environment and delivering for working families.

\-- Charlie

Democrats could lose Virginia.
| | |

| | Derek, In a moment, I’m going to ask you to [**donate to my friend Terry McAuliffe’s campaign to be Virginia’s next Governor.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32377410/295576020/1097049879?refcode=20210714.1_JC_AK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDRhNDJkMy1hZWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kbZnS4Q0QmoLhcr--4MKrLIgTuIM0mV4GqsYkT4aem8=) But before I do, I want to explain to you why Virginia is 2021’s most important race. The extreme Republican candidate running against Terry is Glenn Youngkin. Youngkin is a mega-millionaire who has Donald Trump’s “full endorsement.” It ain’t a mystery why Trump is all geeked up about Youngkin. Election experts are saying Democrats could lose Virginia. If that happens, Republicans would get a huge surge of momentum going into the 2022 midterms. So it’s this simple: If Glenn Youngkin wins, Donald Trump wins. Worse, Trumpism will be on the march again heading into a pivotal midterm for the future of our democracy. The good news is that Terry McAuliffe has what it takes to win. He’s tough, experienced, and has bold plans for Virginia that every single Democrat should be over the moon to support. Terry can win, but he’s going to need to build a historic grassroots team to pull it off. Youngkin has pledged spending up to $75 million of his own money to buy the Governor’s office for him and Trump. So here’s my ask: Let’s work our hearts out to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins the 2021 Virginia governor’s race. If we do that we put a stake in the heart of Trumpism once and for all. [**Will you donate to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins in Virginia? A Glenn Youngkin victory would be a disaster for the future of our country.**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32377411/295576021/1097049879?refcode=20210714.1_JC_AK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDRhNDJkMy1hZWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kbZnS4Q0QmoLhcr--4MKrLIgTuIM0mV4GqsYkT4aem8=) Thanks, James Carville | [DONATE >>](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32377412/295576022/-2023814932?refcode=20210714.1_JC_AK&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTMvMS84NzU5MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhNDRhNDJkMy1hZWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=kbZnS4Q0QmoLhcr--4MKrLIgTuIM0mV4GqsYkT4aem8=)

Worse, Trumpism will be on the march again heading into a pivotal midterm for the future of our democracy. The good news is that Terry McAuliffe has what it takes to win. He’s tough, experienced, and has bold plans for Virginia that every single Democrat should be over the moon to support. Terry can win, but he’s going to need to build a historic grassroots team to pull it off. Youngkin has pledged spending up to $75 million of his own money to buy the Governor’s office for him and Trump. So here’s my ask: Let’s work our hearts out to make sure Terry McAuliffe wins the 2021 Virginia governor’s race. If we do that we put a stake in the heart of Trumpism once and for all. = Thanks, James Carville | = Terry McAuliffe for Virginia PO Box 31408 Alexandria, VA 22310 If you would like to opt-out of future emails, click. Paid for by Terry for Virginia

subject: This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year. 📨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by TEAM SCALISE, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and to benefit SCALISE FOR CONGRESS and EYE OF THE TIGER PAC
body:
Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.
Hello, it's Steve Scalise here following up for Ron DeSantis.
**This is BY FAR the most important email you'll read this year.**
President Trump made it crystal clear that he needs ALL Conservatives \-- including me, you, and Ron -- to do our part to defend our America first movement.
[**Ron asked for your help. Now I'm asking for it too. Here's your chance to make an essential difference for the future of America.**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57935108:6LBbFPlN4:m:1:3253819041:0385EAC7CC2CD17CBD4C2331B21C00D8:r)
If $25 or $50 is too much, I completely understand. Every little bit helps when the stakes are this high. Even just $5 or $10 can make a world of difference.
Please send in support before it's too late. We really need you.
_\-- Steve Scalise (Republican Whip)_
_\---------- Forwarded Message ----------_
To: [dpwillis67@gmail.com](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57935108:6LBbFPlN4:m:1:3253819041:0385EAC7CC2CD17CBD4C2331B21C00D8:r)
From: **Ron DeSantis**
Subject: You know me. I'm not one to mince words.

Hey Peter, it's Governor Ron DeSantis. You know me -- I'm not one to mince words.
**Neither is President Trump.**
That's why I proudly supported him when he just made this bold statement: _" The survival of America depends upon our ability to elect Republicans at every level."_
The Liberal Media, the Radical Socialists in Congress, and Joe Biden's cronies are plowing ahead to fundamentally change everything that makes America great.
[**I 'm asking for you to help Republicans right now!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57935109:6LBbFPlN4:m:1:3253819041:0385EAC7CC2CD17CBD4C2331B21C00D8:r)
Our country is at a crossroad.
We either let the Democrats turn America into a Socialist country and tear President Trump's legacy apart...
**OR we come together and prove that our America first movement is worth fighting for!**
[**If every Patriot chips in a few bucks, we will have the resources to elect Republicans up and down the ballot!**](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57935108:6LBbFPlN4:m:1:3253819041:0385EAC7CC2CD17CBD4C2331B21C00D8:r)
_This won't be easy -- we need your help._
...And you don't strike me as someone who gives up when the going gets tough.
**That 's why I'm coming directly to you, Peter. Are you in?**
For America,
[](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57935108:6LBbFPlN4:m:1:3253819041:0385EAC7CC2CD17CBD4C2331B21C00D8:r)
Ron DeSantis

name: Election Integrity Task Force (via House GOP)
subject: Kamala Harris is at it again.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
VP Harris is pushing back against safe and secure elections. Will you stand with Conservatives today?

****
**" Well, there are a whole lot of people, especially people who live in rural communities, who don't... there's no Kinkos, there's no OfficeMax near them." \- Kamala Harris**

Elitist Kamala Harris is at it again. This time, claiming that if you're not a _coastal elite_ , then **you couldn 't possibly have access to the basic necessities needed to prove your identity while voting. **

Meanwhile,_** 80% of Americans support needing to show a form of ID in order to vote.**_ Sounds like Kamala Harris and the Radical Left are once again out of touch with the people they represent and _are speaking out of turn for them._

Conservatives across the nation are fighting for a simple ask: **that our elections are secure and fair.** But the Democrats are refusing to accept that request. Instead, they'd rather insult and ignore the people in our country in order to destroy President Trump's legacy, and ensure that they can rig the elections and keep their majority in Congress.

**They must be stopped, Fellow Conservative. **

[**Take Back the House**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=717f738a1d1844559d69c1b0bd2b11a2&_e=TndZNbW98FVVXM0CvcK9nByPoL3-7APR1uMVB7ZRObE2v41q-VUFVP6OFVxRed3n13a3urrbNCCmiAnBECKH-tYCc-RPjWsz5ulPsIJ2VaRqcY-YngpGXRIAZPM5Hg9VMKM1x1nqYngovH0flh6v6mhqcZFfyKAAJmtjASCyiwVInLsUxfUHE_38vVeM-R27PgBBJ27YcT_ljVN75BEnNVT9RRoNMFqhh55xwP6NPpvzoOwKInbJa6wiobnqNIrfms-Jq7-MNwD1B7Vtja5pZCPEqwAlkqUT90KvUj5mfXJukjzVXawK-5EotfFm75psUWfqKAJSeQf0KXhDYUWEFFp3MCNgId2ozm_X8C44uqLmBFNPFR9QMv0VukeAsd7rN1mLwTRTIgBjaPmOSLYr0t5rrwcoArJiEzvR4Em1ONBMYqUZq-zxOpxOk9q26rbAvun9ZXusvDZOSq6dM0QQpWjt9mm9N897JNIU8CuIE0GGu_SGlhhCNVbpo1vxMJHPvAuhN6fkx5QxtJ_vnaW_q3A9mKuITCgJnheT9a5Tyq940ztQJscyPx0brR-DLa6c)

The recklessness and senseless policies the Left is trying to implement will destroy our country. Their socialist agenda does nothing but hurt the American people. _**But they can 't be stopped without you on our team, Fellow Conservative. **_

The Radical Left will do everything they can to make it harder for Conservative leaders to be elected to Congress. Still, our team is backed by hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters who are tired of the Left's condescending and superior attitude and willing to take the fight to the Democrats.

**We want results. **

And the only way we can change the tide now is by electing proven Conservative leaders and restoring President Trump's Republican Majority in Congress. [**Are you with us?**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=717f738a1d1844559d69c1b0bd2b11a2&_e=TndZNbW98FVVXM0CvcK9nByPoL3-7APR1uMVB7ZRObE2v41q-VUFVP6OFVxRed3n13a3urrbNCCmiAnBECKH-tYCc-RPjWsz5ulPsIJ2VaRqcY-YngpGXRIAZPM5Hg9VMKM1x1nqYngovH0flh6v6mhqcZFfyKAAJmtjASCyiwVInLsUxfUHE_38vVeM-R27PgBBJ27YcT_ljVN75BEnNVT9RRoNMFqhh55xwP6NPpvzoOwKInbJa6wiobnqNIrfms-Jq7-MNwD1B7Vtja5pZCPEqwAlkqUT90KvUj5mfXJukjzVXawK-5EotfFm75psUWfqKAJSeQf0KXhDYUWEFFp3MCNgId2ozm_X8C44uqIEaHQnjVFxfqUR5epBDIWlYJNr8-B-YPR3OtDulKdpYI0Fpds4HY-dRlWG_P6mrVkMi-bAO03mzTcNUaiThFwUHhTu89-a4EM9DYKN2AXXDUw5k2hN9Rp6L5mPd2EYtg7HGG4MRUAI_M_JipxbsgjxKYN7jrTw8diIBs7PDjmJcxsJVlzTTHY0xwMGFD-y8qYv_t4yUY8YFzHxEsAJ7muj)

[**Take Back the House**](http://links.makingamericathegreatest.com/u/click?_t=79fa4a3daf024a0a886c5b498ff32e32&_m=717f738a1d1844559d69c1b0bd2b11a2&_e=TndZNbW98FVVXM0CvcK9nByPoL3-7APR1uMVB7ZRObE2v41q-VUFVP6OFVxRed3n13a3urrbNCCmiAnBECKH-tYCc-RPjWsz5ulPsIJ2VaRqcY-YngpGXRIAZPM5Hg9VMKM1x1nqYngovH0flh6v6mhqcZFfyKAAJmtjASCyiwVInLsUxfUHE_38vVeM-R27PgBBJ27YcT_ljVN75BEnNVT9RRoNMFqhh55xwP6NPpvzoOwKInbJa6wiobnqNIrfms-Jq7-MNwD1B7Vtja5pZCPEqwAlkqUT90KvUj5mfXJukjzVXawK-5EotfFm75psUWfqKAJSeQf0KXhDYUWEFFp3MCNgId2ozm_X8C44uqLRy90ugFri7FouvW-EFs5Mj-ePe0TFoiZ8_P-6dzSjzfKf39Blh2Tg8abFkWFd9-SZBYvkYziYOeIVLHq34rW8C0euzizCPTjjbct1CAWv72QUo_eLuYLxQxtU8tiNBoVJk3yzq5x7t6kSb3po562myNzrIgF55W0vu3wquCGfUzvcr4Ik0XIVSKk3VugKCvx47EiqajYLTYSgy1IBAEDe)

clean_body: VP Harris is pushing back against safe and secure elections. Will you stand with Conservatives today? ** " Well, there are a whole lot of people, especially people who live in rural communities, who don't... there's no Kinkos, there's no OfficeMax near them." \- Kamala Harris Elitist Kamala Harris is at it again. This time, claiming that if you're not a coastal elite , then you couldn 't possibly have access to the basic necessities needed to prove your identity while voting. Meanwhile, 80% of Americans support needing to show a form of ID in order to vote. Sounds like Kamala Harris and the Radical Left are once again out of touch with the people they represent and are speaking out of turn for them. Conservatives across the nation are fighting for a simple ask: that our elections are secure and fair. But the Democrats are refusing to accept that request. Instead, they'd rather insult and ignore the people in our country in order to destroy President Trump's legacy, and ensure that they can rig the elections and keep their majority in Congress. They must be stopped, Fellow Conservative. The recklessness and senseless policies the Left is trying to implement will destroy our country. Their socialist agenda does nothing but hurt the American people. But they can 't be stopped without you on our team, Fellow Conservative. The Radical Left will do everything they can to make it harder for Conservative leaders to be elected to Congress. Still, our team is backed by hundreds of thousands of grassroots supporters who are tired of the Left's condescending and superior attitude and willing to take the fight to the Democrats. We want results. And the only way we can change the tide now is by electing proven Conservative leaders and restoring President Trump's Republican Majority in Congress. If you stand for election security and for your vote always to be counted, then step up now and help Conservatives take back the House to ensure that our vote is protected for years to come. The Left will continue to push through their Socialist agenda, and without Conservative members there to push back, our country will be in ruins. Tomorrow is too late, Fellow Conservative. Thank you, House Conservatives Paid for by the NRCC and not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. name: Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
"They're not trying to educate; they're trying to indoctrinate." \- Ron DeSantis

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57931720:JcGjSPlN-:m:1:3253819041:A7EC7D86F6C575B7350A5807101458A6:r)
---
Peter,

The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.

**[_Over the weekend, the nation's largest teachers union (the NEA) approved a plan to promote Critical Race Theory in ALL 50 states and over 14,000 local school districts._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57931720:JcGjSPlN-:m:1:3253819041:A7EC7D86F6C575B7350A5807101458A6:r)**

**Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time.** The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America.

**LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS:**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57931720:JcGjSPlN-:m:1:3253819041:A7EC7D86F6C575B7350A5807101458A6:r)
**_[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against the Critical Race Theory and the teachers unions. We can 't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57931720:JcGjSPlN-:m:1:3253819041:A7EC7D86F6C575B7350A5807101458A6:r)_**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors."**

_The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them._ This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

**Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us DEFEAT Critical Race Theory> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57931720:JcGjSPlN-:m:1:3253819041:A7EC7D86F6C575B7350A5807101458A6:r)**

Did you see this?
Kat joined Spicer & Co. on Newsmax to discuss Biden's response to the most recent Russian ransomware attack aimed at America. Kat discusses the dangers of a President that is willing to look the other way and put Americans and their businesses at risk. You don't want to miss this interview!

| Cyber attacks on America's critical infrastructure are attacks on America.
There should be no debate on this point. Our Commander-in-Chief should be holding the Russian hackers accountable, but instead, we have President Biden drawing red lines and doing nothing when they are crossed.
President Obama did the same thing in Syria, and now we are getting Obama 2.0 in the Biden Administration. It's time to secure our cyber vulnerabilities and hold the hackers accountable for their crimes against the American people.

Fellow American,

Critical race theory has no place in the public school system. **[Agree or disagree?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=59d7ea733eab4f34a33e3f276b49a952&_e=f5zxwE_Ook7uaw8-2g-PXdmF7kyW2TEub0LUXBEaGV95JD3i__NY6oTDEOC3TaJmnM8tvsbfqi0mLLq4FbsF53-wYvOhPW77p4udeVWxRJTc3xHFoZQWdgVHmujZSAjHNLjz7psyqotjbmKHtk6Cs1OYCZK2QtEbcBUzstYV6vbn-1-vrr27kIyVsxZRXG2MktIVM2QwGw3tJm36RpUH4retcvu4CZPEddBoBC2GjKd2m2s5YIxlw_JifxpjSEmWGCgaZENG6jOAr-ieCGhSUY6GK6mLMZjUm8WMMIgdlaBKRGhsa16flq9y08VwTxuC5Gu8MYzLF-lwHkgzJQ8DT5II5yINYzhQnim4T1Qy236aG4TVBMZ2IT2pYyg3m0xnqnEunqgx9626HauxxErxvai6TtIsKsIybQeZg52jCUtUhfOhkheDIwfHGFXN9wLrYAMlQp_vOHhkNB6o3GrDUNRb0tU6-RqoW6IjaxxXyOHCECPGS699nxbunDfXRX8c)**

There is no sugarcoating the fact that our country’s past is full of events that have left painful scars, but we’ve learned from the mistakes of our ancestors, and we continue to work to improve on our imperfect union. But if you talk to a liberal, chances are they’re going to tell you that America is an inherently racist country. And that the Constitution itself is racist.

**How absurd**.

Fellow American, it’s critically important that my team, as well as the entire Republican Party knows where you stand on this issue, **particularly in light of the fact that the nation’s largest teacher’s union just endorsed teaching critical race theory to our middle and high school students**.

Please take a moment to let us know:

| _**

[DO YOU SUPPORT A FEDERAL BAN ON CRITICAL RACE THEORY IN PUBLIC SCHOOLS?](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=59d7ea733eab4f34a33e3f276b49a952&_e=f5zxwE_Ook7uaw8-2g-PXdmF7kyW2TEub0LUXBEaGV95JD3i__NY6oTDEOC3TaJmnM8tvsbfqi0mLLq4FbsF53-wYvOhPW77p4udeVWxRJTc3xHFoZQWdgVHmujZSAjHNLjz7psyqotjbmKHtk6Cs1OYCZK2QtEbcBUzstYV6vbn-1-vrr27kIyVsxZRXG2MktIVM2QwGw3tJm36RpUH4retcvu4CZPEddBoBC2GjKd2m2s5YIxlw_JifxpjSEmWGCgaZENG6jOAr-ieCGhSUY6GK6mLMZjUm8WMMIgdlaAB2YKt8b6PtrzY7OjKaGhptH077px4duaKUnz9sKbedvYglJRqGDpAUTB223NuMBOw--TAbhqe6ZHTGRaTaMd6JTRdgKto08UPU4JSMC2muOtymv6GfQb9zbZqSVu7_wexfMQGU62xB0AZvLbSVWNh_W5z6J9tnD1-rTDszBSUSaZaYwdiqyhFZqUnnAuN2ucYv4Vox18qntaGE_LXxufJ)** _

POLL REQUEST FOR: dpwillis67@gmail.com

Response Deadline: Tuesday, July 13th

[** TAKE OUR POLL BEFORE MIDNIGHT->**](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=59d7ea733eab4f34a33e3f276b49a952&_e=f5zxwE_Ook7uaw8-2g-PXdmF7kyW2TEub0LUXBEaGV95JD3i__NY6oTDEOC3TaJmnM8tvsbfqi0mLLq4FbsF53-wYvOhPW77p4udeVWxRJTc3xHFoZQWdgVHmujZSAjHNLjz7psyqotjbmKHtk6Cs1OYCZK2QtEbcBUzstYV6vbn-1-vrr27kIyVsxZRXG2MktIVM2QwGw3tJm36RpUH4retcvu4CZPEddBoBC2GjKd2m2s5YIxlw_JifxpjSEmWGCgaZENG6jOAr-ieCGhSUY6GK6mLMZjUm8WMMIgdlaB_QO_q8aNJShYhAR9DVDbKFaoJfb3G1gHvCHxXtTloZ2P8rmUm5pMRtfu8TVex7c3FBqjM6BToJIK1o2szsdjS4FpaGkZ8z0FNbJ3AOjnUuTvG54qfvQ0CD4FsjAu99RZNDcYi5AQsRwLeH8E4nvZ1deeollSVVrVHbnBLsG5JmD4qwXJ91UnKW7z9SNIlr_d_11p7qemK9pGEOUF3UHBn)

---

Why would we ever teach our children that Americans are created unequal?

The motto which has guided our nation through the last 245 years, do you know it? It’s “ _e pluribus unum_ ” – out of many, one.

This is what the Left does, Fellow American, they take obscure political theories from ivy league universities and try to make them mainstream to further divide America.

**[Please let us know where you stand on this. It’s so important that we stop the Democrats before they start indoctrinating our children with obscure ideas from the fringe Left](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=59d7ea733eab4f34a33e3f276b49a952&_e=f5zxwE_Ook7uaw8-2g-PXdmF7kyW2TEub0LUXBEaGV95JD3i__NY6oTDEOC3TaJmnM8tvsbfqi0mLLq4FbsF53-wYvOhPW77p4udeVWxRJTc3xHFoZQWdgVHmujZSAjHNLjz7psyqotjbmKHtk6Cs1OYCZK2QtEbcBUzstYV6vbn-1-vrr27kIyVsxZRXG2MktIVM2QwGw3tJm36RpUH4retcvu4CZPEddBoBC2GjKd2m2s5YIxlw_JifxpjSEmWGCgaZENG6jOAr-ieCGhSUY6GK6mLMZjUm8WMMIgdlaB_Bi-g2kunhcoziM_AN6oNbLcv_6qQaor9LJW0UHZtejriCvbtmHZE_6FIxsQpLyX1mawn13gOSJgrx56qxW4hH8qBLo3DHwD7MhFSZpZsDgRq_dUsymPuEbaGLZmyGnNnmRAwENiQJTBqpTtBRKqtpLm4ehb-B8uYwEw7PnL-Xw643yaTa2FFx2oJaGmhILR6IS_HqTJBcPJbwy_SFWir)**.

Thank you,
[](http://links.americansfordjt.com/u/click?_t=aff9c7dfb71242f8abc6b00341ebfdb2&_m=59d7ea733eab4f34a33e3f276b49a952&_e=f5zxwE_Ook7uaw8-2g-PXdmF7kyW2TEub0LUXBEaGV95JD3i__NY6oTDEOC3TaJmnM8tvsbfqi0mLLq4FbsF53-wYvOhPW77p4udeVWxRJTc3xHFoZQWdgVHmujZSAjHNLjz7psyqotjbmKHtk6Cs1OYCZK2QtEbcBUzstYV6vbn-1-vrr27kIyVsxZRXG2MktIVM2QwGw3tJm36RpUH4retcvu4CZPEddBoBC2GjKd2m2s5YIxlw_JifxpjSEmWGCgaZENG6jOAr-ieCGhSUY6GK6mLMZjUm8WMMIgdlaCF9hyiVEQ5J0xAWF9jQRuvefoKPxjgfF23LlUPfEGqGnufK_DD1sw7z19lCsZbFXzYbOlkLWuX5Ow6uIilXgWudzFe_HcUGmWI2savWE-nSPO_U4t9wgd_gC3SsFyNunNSmYxgEZxt2BKOFdRzQrxE9sxZ7u4YIP7TExEcuqs-zoyq9e0J7uXVeE7fG3Fp8z2dS3x71tzTVgLyrrBE_RmJ)

name: Culp for Congress
subject: Voting? No ID Required.
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS
body:
View online [https://app.getresponse.com/view.html?x=a62b&m=BzzxQZ&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIYD9G2&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/dfd30a52-87a7-412a-b82f-3a803a1fd587.png]

No ID required.

There is a reason Washington State voters question election integrity because with mail in voting there is no way to know who actually filled out a ballot and mailed it in. There are no identification requirements with mail in voting. How can we possibly know that Joe Smith signed Joe Smith's ballot? The answer is, we can't!

Voting is a serious exercise of our civic duty that effects not only our community and state's future but also our nation's future. That weight of responsibility should not be treated lightly but the Dems want to force states (through the H.R. 1 Bill [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SWFQ5o&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EIyXyvg&]) to allow individuals to vote without an ID and merely sign a statement in which they claim they are who they say they are.
Sound familiar? No ID required, like mail in voting in Washington State?

The Federal Government has no place in how states run elections!

H.R. 1 would seize the authority of managing elections from the states. We must keep the Federal Government within it's proper boundaries. Biden's Department of Justice head Merrick Garland has even targeted the election audits taking place in Maricopa County. [https://app.getresponse.com/click.html?x=a62b&lc=SWFQYw&mc=rr&s=Bttw6dS&u=Q96gS&z=EQXtRSY&]

[https://m.gr-cdn-6.com/getresponse-Q96gS/photos/6069ebad-012c-45cc-918d-a5fe081d8fc9.jpg]

We must demand transparency.

It is vital for our Constitutional Republic that we know our elections can be trusted. The audits that are taking place and the new voter laws being written and passed in states like, Arizona, Florida, Texas, Georgia, etc. are so important and we cannot allow the Federal Government to try and take away state sovereignty. The audits will allow us a way to make sure that our election process is valid and trustworthy.

People like Dan Newhouse that side with Biden and cast their votes in favor of amnesty bills that will give the radical left voting power have no place representing the American people, representing you. The power belongs to the people, belongs to you, and we can't forget that.

I'm honored to be running in Washington's 4th District and I will always represent you by following our nation's founding documents. Newhouse has proven he will go along with the radical left.

There is hope for our country, but only if "we the people" work together. Stay strong because America will be great again!

Fighting every day for you,

Loren

There is a reason Washington State voters question election integrity because with mail in voting there is no way to know who actually filled out a ballot and mailed it in. There are no identification requirements with mail in voting. How can we possibly know that Joe Smith signed Joe Smith's ballot? The answer is, we can't! Voting is a serious exercise of our civic duty that effects not only our community and state's future but also our nation's future. That weight of responsibility should not be treated lightly but the Dems want to force states (through the H.R. 1 Bill [&]) to allow individuals to vote without an ID and merely sign a statement in which they claim they are who they say they are. Sound familiar? No ID required, like mail in voting in Washington State? The Federal Government has no place in how states run elections! H.R. 1 would seize the authority of managing elections from the states. We must keep the Federal Government within it's proper boundaries. Biden's Department of Justice head Merrick Garland has even targeted the election audits taking place in Maricopa County. [&] [] We must demand transparency. It is vital for our Constitutional Republic that we know our elections can be trusted. The audits that are taking place and the new voter laws being written and passed in states like, Arizona, Florida, Texas, Georgia, etc. are so important and we cannot allow the Federal Government to try and take away state sovereignty. The audits will allow us a way to make sure that our election process is valid and trustworthy. People like Dan Newhouse that side with Biden and cast their votes in favor of amnesty bills that will give the radical left voting power have no place representing the American people, representing you. The power belongs to the people, belongs to you, and we can't forget that. I'm honored to be running in Washington's 4th District and I will always represent you by following our nation's founding documents. Newhouse has proven he will go along with the radical left. There is hope for our country, but only if "we the people" work together. Stay strong because America will be great again! Fighting every day for you, Loren I CAN DO $25! [&] I WILL STEP UP AND DO $50! [&] THIS IS IMPORTANT. I CAN DO $100! [&] I CAN PLAY BIG LEAGUE AND DO $250! [&] PAID FOR BY CULP FOR CONGRESS , 11035 Lavender Hill Drive, Suite 160, Box 194, Las vegas, NV 89135, United States You may unsubscribe [] or change your contact details [] at any time. Powered by: &

Because of Senator Warnock's win, Democrats rescued the American economy and successfully rolled out the COVID vaccine. **[And we're just getting started.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32387752/295606429/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210714_GEN_FDR_D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmIyZGMyLWMwZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9Lq-_1u_9kzjYUb-l64H9mSyjvYTjWlfAE_f7QoNi7I=)** **But Mitch McConnell plans to beat Warnock and take back power for his MAGA allies. When it all came down to Georgia, Democrats like you stepped up to deliver a blue Senate. But Warnock's seat is not safe, and **too many Democrats think the fight is over.**

**[Peter, if we don't fight for Raphael Warnock right NOW, we will lose it all. Last month, we set a $3,000 goal to save this Georgia Senate seat, and we're STILL $1,200 away. That's why we're asking you now: Will you step up with a $10, $25, or $50 donation today to save Senator Warnock?](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32387755/295606433/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210714_GEN_FDR_D&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjg1MmIyZGMyLWMwZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=9Lq-_1u_9kzjYUb-l64H9mSyjvYTjWlfAE_f7QoNi7I=)**

As a leading Republican voice in Washington, I have been fighting back every single day against the socialist, job-killing, open borders wing of the Democrat party. Just opposing the Democrats' socialist plans can be a full-time job, Fellow Conservative. Fellow Conservative, we simply cannot wait until 2022 – the Democrats have already begun flooding my New Mexico district. - Thank you, Yvette Herrell (R-NM) P.S. Last year, I flipped a congressional seat from Blue to RED. NOW the Left wants it back. Will you help me defend this seat? | Born and raised in New Mexico, Yvette Herrell served for 4 terms in the New Mexico House of Representatives. Yvette puts people before politics, championing our small businesses and representing our rural values in Washington. ---|--- | | ---|---|--- | PAID FOR BY YVETTE4CONGRESS Don't want to receive any more of our emails?

clean_body: Enough is enough. | There’s not much time, Peter, so we’ll get straight to the point. Peter, Nancy Pelosi’s Socialist Agenda is destroying America. She supports socialized medicine, and she refuses to stand up the members of her party demanding that we defunding the police. And she OPENLY supports a federal government takeover of our elections, INCLUDING seizing taxpayer funds to power Democrat political campaigns! | | | | | | Nancy Pelosi and her Socialist Allies are out of step with Mainstream American Values, Peter. She wants to transform your community into a far-left disaster like her native San Francisco: rampant homelessness, drug abuse, crime, and extreme taxes. If Republican Patriots (like you) don’t step up and fight back, who will? | Thank you. Republican Action Alerts Sent via Elect Republicans

name: Hendrell Remus
subject: The TNDP knows what’s at stake
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY THE TENNESSEE DEMOCRATIC PARTY, CAROL V
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Peter,
Here’s the deal. In order to accomplish our mission in 2022 we need to be well funded today. We need to raise another $9,355 by midnight tomorrow to reach our mid-month fundraising goal. Can we count on your support? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
By organizing and coordinating across the entire state, the TNDP has plans to turn Tennessee blue. This is a herculean effort, and it’s only made possible by the generosity of supporters like you. We know what’s at stake here. Bill Lee is sprinting backwards when we need to be looking forward. Will you donate $5, $10, or whatever you can, and help the TNDP reach this goal by midnight tomorrow? [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Thank you,
Hendrell Remus
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
Chair, Tennessee Democratic Party
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tndpemailgeneral]
P.S. Please, only donate if you can afford to. The impacts of this pandemic are real, and we completely understand if times are tough right now.

name: Aaron Jacobs
subject: FWD: Doubling donations
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Some supporters can’t donate - can you help fill the gap? | | |
---
Folks, we recently sent around a survey to our community and found 188 people who want to support our campaign but can't afford to right now. We want everyone to prioritize their own needs first so we're asking, if you can, to please donate in honor of someone who can’t. **[Thursday is our mid-month deadline, and we're still $5,735 short – whatever you give today will help us reach that goal. From: **Maggie Hassan**
Date: Tue., July 13, 2021
Subject: Doubling Donations

Hello,
The pandemic has hit families hard. It’s one of the reasons I really hate to ask for money.
That’s why recently, my team asked some folks in this community why they hadn’t donated to our campaign yet. If someone is struggling to get by, I want to make sure they’re prioritizing putting food on the table.
188 people told us that they’d like to donate to our campaign but they just can’t swing it right now. That’s why I’m coming to you. While I don’t need you to make up 188 donations, I’m hoping that you can give now so that grassroots supporters who have fallen on hard times don’t have to worry about it.
**[Will you please donate $5 before Thursday’s mid-month deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32390998/295617994/1018596853?refcode=e20210714_match_kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTRjZWNmMS1jOWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlHrBo_kLh3I1sgbI-wl8JG2X-XbuNwjJX8c5GT7ugA=)**
I'll say it again: I hate to ask you for money, especially since you’ve already been so generous. But my race was the closest one of 2016, and Republicans only need to flip ONE seat to take back the majority. There is simply too much at stake for me not to ask.
**[Please -- anything you can give helps and could make all of the difference in protecting New Hampshire’s vulnerable Senate seat and our fragile Democratic majority.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32390999/295617995/1018596853?refcode=e20210714_match_kicker&amounts=5,25,50,100,250&amount=5&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI0NTRjZWNmMS1jOWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=dlHrBo_kLh3I1sgbI-wl8JG2X-XbuNwjJX8c5GT7ugA=)**

body:
For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? [Unsubscribe here.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/e/encryptedUnsubscribe?_r=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_s=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_t=3W4nJe2qRMdbkfEuN1G-H6fhwY0VtIRTBV2zS0YYrqXWqRSH9vDxA4-btcK0_TLfxgrEkrOk6EgNazVeY6Z6pA4a6DwyJrvfaHsWqO1gs15E7Swxqk_53BhWD78LhjrcUqGSpRzXn0K-kH9P06u4L1CPnRyEg7QmE0qJJEi-Lok%3D) | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_e=xaTiaQI_QKWQwYdJwnUK6rH8Zj-0wuTKjn3HGnvH7JUvYCqIVVPUPgpcbNA0xjjYtT7L_bhX9B4FclK_TNsqBEi6W-phNJXqbtvMagE451pFFvQJV8xt6eq1HKtoShmcxADKz8hvQhZN2Oy2iHZdDsjo4Lxxyo9jgsr5qVNB0YQuPYiVP1uXSUOuHZrBTogN-vsmR_P4WYGZieAWu-TdJMesf6Nezmo3z2hpR_CUe5tkQPDxDXRvSoIOPOrB8Uudh7hy-npwH54tMCXdb19sQBQzErOh3KPwLHXKnYddoTggyWImNwvo44xM-g216CACjCADtU5NzqaykVOX7ndyXDKXfV-Y-jVob-7mk7_1r1oJO8VEfIEP-bZ55o6pdUy5GBtK0K1XHubD-Cm5PjB8Py4l-PrQ2hi2nTaMMUSZL4Wx3UZT6i41mTeOIiYR-c3aSrJuLuyo2Exv8zO13wV6E1V4ZmVQ9dTNV4zTxw_gKGA%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox **I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today.**

I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.**I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own**.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_e=xaTiaQI_QKWQwYdJwnUK6rH8Zj-0wuTKjn3HGnvH7JUvYCqIVVPUPgpcbNA0xjjYtT7L_bhX9B4FclK_TNsqBEi6W-phNJXqbtvMagE451pFFvQJV8xt6eq1HKtoShmcxADKz8hvQhZN2Oy2iHZdDsjo4Lxxyo9jgsr5qVNB0YQuPYiVP1uXSUOuHZrBTogN-vsmR_P4WYGZieAWu-TdJMesf6Nezmo3z2hpR_CUe5tkQPDxDXRvSoIOPOrB8Uudh7hy-npwH54tMCXdb19sQALLhRg_WiFkr8A41b75G5nGP2A_ChwT9AObyXd0d3b1HBDUUkoZJO9Sn2gvUV6Oh_V_ncxM-lhgzHXT_mgF2uYLrd3aCf7agmW4mmTMsqj1t8iAdJVbluF5maeWuEphdCGZ9d6Yer6Nifcm6E63s47yaBNPFT2tzj14prT06Vgi_iiSNtsm4PrcMb6A3vs-1RvZuaWeIHbHfrz-7DvuVw8%3D)

Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency **[I gave up my career in the intelligence service- along with my security clearance - to run for Congress](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_e=xaTiaQI_QKWQwYdJwnUK6rH8Zj-0wuTKjn3HGnvH7JUvYCqIVVPUPgpcbNA0xjjYtT7L_bhX9B4FclK_TNsqBEi6W-phNJXqbtvMagE451pFFvQJV8xt6eq1HKtoShmcxADKz8hvQhZN2Oy2iHZdDsjo4Lxxyo9jgsr5qVNB0YQuPYiVP1uXSUOuHZrBTogN-vsmR_P4WYGZieAWu-TdJMesf6Nezmo3z2hpR_CUe5tkQPDxDXRvSoIOPOrB8Uudh7hy-npwH54tMCXdb19sQC6we2QWPv9Jb2KWaBGYZGN7hgfOBS6vhMEE0BNMXVThxVzRXMontR1gQP4KuGHtWXS4HZDqHyvZ1SwoKIbMtkJ34fTKwipw_kRb83dMdKkoY46gApdtr0L6EXbkfUUC6kohQsIESbSG7iQn0-GJ47sD0q-oP29vGvmsKnY4bvtodUy02X-vhmSr4J3aQmiGi38y2oBG_YRv7d-NJMloiKQ%3D)**. I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price.

If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.**As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable** , and in a moment, [**I’m going to humbly ask for your financial assistance regarding my campaign.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_e=xaTiaQI_QKWQwYdJwnUK6rH8Zj-0wuTKjn3HGnvH7JUvYCqIVVPUPgpcbNA0xjjYtT7L_bhX9B4FclK_TNsqBEi6W-phNJXqbtvMagE451pFFvQJV8xt6eq1HKtoShmcxADKz8hvQhZN2Oy2iHZdDsjo4Lxxyo9jgsr5qVNB0YQuPYiVP1uXSUOuHZrBTogN-vsmR_P4WYGZieAWu-TdJMesf6Nezmo3z2hpR_CUe5tkQPDxDXRvSoIOPOrB8Uudh7hy-npwH54tMCXdb19sQEh81Me1TL52YxWqR9vDW49n4HNSXilUjGYxSsrvs4Z4ZaxE__PByb5_1H_Kcnbsas0vgH5ttZexfHqu5w6hQLse94YkZMjys9EwK6RRjLa2_wqK_zj0L6WcFQKWboOkqQ12qZM0r-C2_-ucoJzrHa_bKhf2jscD3smHvuFOZTMJJUQ9oATz_18SNWplGDeZR5RV6JHULx281cxkK4GNuRs%3D)

You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, _**who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades**_ - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel.

**This political assassination made my blood boil**. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. _**We have to fight for it**_.

| [**HELP ME FIGHT FOR _YOU_
MAKE A GIFT TODAY ** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_e=xaTiaQI_QKWQwYdJwnUK6rH8Zj-0wuTKjn3HGnvH7JUvYCqIVVPUPgpcbNA0xjjYtT7L_bhX9B4FclK_TNsqBEi6W-phNJXqbtvMagE451pFFvQJV8xt6eq1HKtoShmcxADKz8hvQhZN2Oy2iHZdDsjo4Lxxyo9jgsr5qVNB0YQuPYiVP1uXSUOuHZrBTogN-vsmR_P4WYGZieAWu-TdJMesf6Nezmo3z2hpR_CUe5tkQPDxDXRvSoIOPOrB8Uudh7hy-npwH54tMCXdb19sQEQFChUrUeHlTcJ7U7NineoOZ2ew1EHEdB7eYk4jbuOLvjgXuVEkERkCXj22Yny0OljUw5m2N2amg1hKwaOMWa-QAOGgqVfFe246UNKthBRpRzRoWrSC-mgRbjvASLIulED4XGIG1x4q__cbquPw2s7wu3gsdDDBwPgBZCoY7aW9dvnokDkOLZhq8M7W2Xj73Q8zvqu3vZaKletV056DCiQ%3D)

Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason **[I’m running for Congress, and today I’m asking if you’ll chip-in $5 or $10 to help me get my campaign off the ground.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_e=xaTiaQI_QKWQwYdJwnUK6rH8Zj-0wuTKjn3HGnvH7JUvYCqIVVPUPgpcbNA0xjjYtT7L_bhX9B4FclK_TNsqBEi6W-phNJXqbtvMagE451pFFvQJV8xt6eq1HKtoShmcxADKz8hvQhZN2Oy2iHZdDsjo4Lxxyo9jgsr5qVNB0YQuPYiVP1uXSUOuHZrBTogN-vsmR_P4WYGZieAWu-TdJMesf6Nezmo3z2hpR_CUe5tkQPDxDXRvSoIOPOrB8Uudh7hy-npwH54tMCXdb19sQPM7_-v6iCRzcO_04EtJLOekymoWfcftFl5NXjbBXfUoWlvFAiYFZH3KFnwLICZwoj_aLdyTJbQIiOLkchKIefrVifh7yUT1Zq5rXxy9xqaqZ0j2OpDZLQudr0SIKjQm6ym8z3Twpv1sflhJ3r0oP0PpMZD4G8XmIoC8X7Bg5IDZh3EiXw4SfUmp_dxdosyoZo47jTFe5-dxYWvrlpVCmQ4%3D) **

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=7e6ee6d0b8964a92b33b8bad993040cc&_e=xaTiaQI_QKWQwYdJwnUK6rH8Zj-0wuTKjn3HGnvH7JUvYCqIVVPUPgpcbNA0xjjYtT7L_bhX9B4FclK_TNsqBEi6W-phNJXqbtvMagE451pFFvQJV8xt6eq1HKtoShmcxADKz8hvQhZN2Oy2iHZdDsjo4Lxxyo9jgsr5qVNB0YQuPYiVP1uXSUOuHZrBTogN-vsmR_P4WYGZieAWu-TdJMesf6Nezmo3z2hpR_CUe5tkQPDxDXRvSoIOPOrB8Uudh7hy-npwH54tMCXdb19sQPUP3DVEThnhT0Yd9ruwarEtlDODx0OH3bdX-_9oYQOZ6YeB6nSWx_ouVsiB9eJBZIfNHah6OjHPHK1ce_rvpvZs_dnVYJWEN8MhtArgtekOcfWPloJAthVRmX4nnhnhkC1IgjdQpBoRd3fyVO6Z8JqjwbBxVJ_VCPBCPY12yfiltk-KDe05CiREquETNs_Yp8ngH7I1iBAMeuxBgyn2i4g%3D)
At the time of the Benghazi attacks, **Hillary Clinton** knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She **knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable**. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, **purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack** , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally.

**[Hillary Clinton’s deceptions and lies will forever stand to serve as prime examples of everything that is wrong in Washington. clean_body: For six years, I hunted the Benghazi terrorists. Then we elected Joe Biden, I quit my job to hold politicians accountable Today I'm asking you to help me give back to the men and women of the national guard who are stepping up to protect our communities in this time of uncertainty. Don't want to receive our emails? | Fellow Conservative, My name is John Castorani, and like a lot of other political candidates whose emails wind up in your inbox I’m hoping you’ll give me 30-seconds to a minute to explain why I’m reaching out to you today. I’m a 29-year-old conservative from central Virginia and I love this country of ours with all of my heart. Until earlier this year I was a member of the United States intelligence community.I deployed seven times with the Army’s Special Operations Command hunting radical Islamic terrorists across the Islamic MAGREB and in continental Africa. The men my team and I were charged with hunting down and capturing, in every case, posed an existential threat to democratic countries around the world, and I’m proud to say for that for 11 years my job was to track down and eliminate threats to your family and my own. Upon the election of Joe Biden to the presidency . I did this because I’m scared to death that Biden is going to repeat the same mistakes of President Obama, and we’re all going to pay the price. If your interest is still piqued, I’m counting on you to continue reading.As I said, I’ve given up my career to run for Congress with the intention of holding Washington bureaucrats more accountable , and in a moment, You may recall the attacks on the United States consulate in Benghazi, Libya, on the 11th of September 2012 (the 11th anniversary of the September 11th attacks). These attacks were carried out by an al-Qaeda affiliate called Ansar al-Sharia and resulted in the deaths of the American ambassador to Libya, Christopher Stevens, who became the first American ambassador to die in the line of duty in more than three decades - along with three additional American security/foreign service personnel. This political assassination made my blood boil. During my six years hunting terrorists in Africa, targeted political killings like the ones that took place in Benghazi reminded me - even in the worst of times - that our freedom isn't free at all. We have to fight for it. | Depending on who you ask, the Benghazi attack was either a random attack or a pre-meditated campaign of murder. But the fact of the matter is this: An American ambassador was killed in the line of duty and politicians pointed fingers at each other over who was responsible. That BS is the reason At the time of the Benghazi attacks, Hillary Clinton knew that she would be running for President in 2016. She knew that these attacks weren’t random as she suggested, and that as the secretary of State she would be held accountable. So, like a good career out-of-touch politician, Mrs. Clinton engaged in a campaign of smoke and mirrors, purposefully leading the American public to believe this was a random attack , when in fact she told her daughter, Chelsea, the very same evening that the attacks took place that they were pre-meditated by an al-Qaeda ally. . In service John Castorani Republican Candidate for Congress VA-07 P.S. I have no money to invest in this campaign. What I do have is a lot of pride , which makes it hard to ask for financial assistance, so please, if you can, | Paid for by John Castorani for Congress

You see, Democrats know they can no longer use physical force to enslave black Americans as they once did. Now, they use the media and culture to oppress us and convince us that we are still victims. The truth is politicians are making millions off this scheme and that is their only motive. Over this past Independence Day weekend, the BLM Utah chapter called the American flag a ‘symbol of hatred’ in a Facebook post. They went on to say, “When we see this flag, we know the person flying it is a racist.” I am proud to have the American flag flying outside my home. I am proud to be a black American in 2021 – where I have equal opportunities as white men and women. But the BLM organization uses anything to divide us – to guilt and fool Americans into funding the lives of corrupt Democrats under the guise of social justice. Which is why I am running for Congress, to show Americans everywhere that there ARE black conservatives who are fighting to break the chains Democrats use to restrict and control minority communities. Thank you, Pastor Brian Hawkins Republican for Congress FOLLOW ME ON SOCIAL MEDIA @REALPASTORBRIAN | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- Don't want to receive any more of our emails? | Paid for by Hawkins for Congress

name: Richard Blumenthal
subject: Today's critical hearing on voting rights
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut
body:
[ ](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=yVv2nEKtMTjBWU83yFUVS%2FzcY5KNkQQC&url=http%3A%2F%2Frichardblumenthal.com%2F)
Friend,
After decades of consistent support and recertification, the Supreme Court - commanded by a conservative majority and led by Chief Justice Roberts - has now gutted the Voting Rights Act not once __but twice__ , rendering what was once hailed as historically effective legislation all but toothless.
**Swift action to restore voting rights is beyond critical. That 's why today, as chair of the Senate Judiciary Subcommittee on The Constitution, I'll be holding an urgent hearing on restoring the Voting Rights Act.** I'm hopeful our subcommittee can work together with the urgency and determination this unprecedented moment calls for. But I need your help creating an undeniable outpouring of support for quick action to strengthen voting rights.
**[So I'm asking: Can I count on you to join me today, before this consequential hearing, to demand the Senate protect Americans' right to vote? I need at least 1,000 members of this grassroots team to make their voices heard.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721-voting-rights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1052-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1052-su-nd)**
It's no exaggeration to say that, in this very moment, the fate of American democracy is at a crossroads: Voter suppression is now law in states like Florida, Georgia, and Arizona, where millions of largely Democratic voters - and Black voters and other voters of color - will be shut out from the ballot box. Texas Democrats have literally had to walk out of the state capitol - twice - in order to break quorum and prevent further erosion to voting rights in Texas.
Make no mistake: This is the culmination of a decades-long, Republican-led assault on voting rights, and the high court's most recent ruling has more or less given extremist GOP state legislators carte blanche to unleash even more laws that suppress the vote. If they succeed in keeping Americans from their rightful place at the ballot box, Republicans will grease their paths to reelection and tighten their grip on power.
Extremist Republican legislators have already introduced more than 400 voter suppression laws, and in the wake of the latest Supreme Court rulings, they will not slow down. It's up to Congress to take bold action - including eliminating the filibuster - to protect voting rights.
**I promise to be unrelenting in enforcing and protecting the Constitution, including every single person 's constitutional right to vote. But in fights like these - bigger than each of us alone - I really count on your voice and your action: [Please, before today's crucial hearing: Take a moment to call on the Senate to protect and strengthen the right to vote.](https://petitions.signforgood.com/blumenthal-0721-voting-rights?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=jtk1052-su-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fgrassroots-strategy-july-2021%3Fcode%3Djtk1052-su-nd)**
Thank you for speaking out in urgent moments like these.
Dick
[ Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/blumenthal-email?refcode=jtk1052-su-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.
[To unsubscribe from the Blumenthal for Connecticut email list, please click here.](http://salsa4.salsalabs.com/dia/track.jsp?v=2&c=pDWuM1CGO9GJ8ZoOyFclv%2FzcY5KNkQQC&url=http%3A%2F%2Faction.richardblumenthal.com%2Fp%2Fsalsa%2Fsupporter%2Funsubscribe%2Fpublic%2Findex.sjs%3Funsubscribe_page_KEY%3D550%26Email%3D%5B%5BEmail%5D%5D%26email_blast_KEY%3D%5B%5Bemail_blast_KEY%5D%5D)
Paid for by Blumenthal for Connecticut

[](http://www.salsalabs.com/?email)

subject: It’s up to Beto now
disclaimer_text: Paid for by When Democrats Turn Out PAC
body:
|
---

| | Peter: The Texas GOP just admitted that their claims of voter fraud are **COMPLETELY BASELESS.** **“I don't think we have any evidence of actual fraud.” \-- Texas' top election official, Keith Ingram.** The Texas GOP will stop at nothing to completely erode voting rights in Texas. Thankfully, Democrats took bold action and broke quorum, and they have now fled the state in an attempt to kill the GOP's undemocratic attempt to restrict the right to vote. While the Texas House Democrats defend democracy through their absence, Beto O'Rourke is defending democracy with his commanding presence. **Beto single-handedly ended the belief that Texas is a solid red state.** He helped send Texas Democrats to Congress, allowing us to keep the majority. And now he's leading the fight against Greg Abbott and GOP voter suppression. | **[HAVE BETO'S BACK: GIVE $25 TODAY](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32394055/295627975/-1699842291?refcode=OUT_20210714_GEN_FDR_F&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzg3NzQxIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogImNkNWNhNDgyLWQxZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=qq3BYrNY0YCU9UuYe3NKIMjvpLHqDF_mFA9_wR4x6hE=)**

subject: Tell Congress: "Pass Biden's infrastructure plan"
body:
We need to flood Senate and House offices with messages in support of Biden’s plan.
| | | | |
---
| | | | |
# [Breaking: Infrastructure Vote Imminent; Tell Congress: "Pass Biden's Infrastructure Plan!"](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8074afc7-6a8c-4f4b-b025-54bd18311d76/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

---
| | | Hi Friend, From buildings to bridges and everything in between, America desperately needs upgrades to our collapsing infrastructure. **[But Mitch McConnell is pushing his Republicans to block it. ](https://default.salsalabs.org/Td2324eac-d35c-415e-b3b4-3c8a23fe4939/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)** They’re too focused on sabotaging President Biden’s work, rather than doing what’s right for the country! A vote is imminent, and we need to flood Senate and House offices with messages in support of Biden’s plan. [Click here to tell your Senators and Reps to support Biden’s infrastructure plan →](https://default.salsalabs.org/T8d0f3e60-36ba-4ac2-aeb8-74bc92abfa83/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9) Your message will automatically be routed to your Senators and Reps, so please send a message now! They are hearing from know-nothing Republicans, and they need to hear from us too! [TELL CONGRESS: PASS BIDEN’S INFRASTRUCTURE PLAN ](https://default.salsalabs.org/T310fdce0-686a-491d-9176-a9cfb4f56eec/368d17ff-e836-4168-8049-c5f0900fbbf9)

name: Ras Smith
subject: Billionaires race to space while folks struggle to get by
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor
body:
| [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32394657/295629679/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210714midmonth1_rs_full_xx_hdr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjUzNGU1Ni1kNGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r99xHrYUjQ8ybGw1sMw6Ej7Sf_CXKwMi8R8WCBRshkI=)
---
Friend, Right now, we have billionaires dumping untold amounts of money into a private space race, competing to literally get out of this world. Billionaires who pay little or absolutely nothing in taxes to support our infrastructure and social services. Meanwhile, we have people all over the country, including right here in Iowa, who are struggling just to get by — folks who are wondering how they’re going to pay next month’s rent, who can’t afford to keep the refrigerator and kitchen cupboards stocked with food for their families, or who are scraping by to pay their student loans or medical bills. **In this country, we’ve empowered the uber-wealthy to make so much money they can build rockets to space, while far too many people lack access to the basic necessities to survive. There’s something very wrong with that picture.** [**This campaign is about changing that picture, fixing our broken system, and delivering for the people of Iowa. If you’re on board, can you chip in $10 or whatever you can to help ensure we reach our mid-month grassroots fundraising goal?**](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32394658/295629684/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210714midmonth1_rs_full_xx_l1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjUzNGU1Ni1kNGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r99xHrYUjQ8ybGw1sMw6Ej7Sf_CXKwMi8R8WCBRshkI=) I believe we should be paying teachers more and investing in our kids’ public schools. I believe we should make healthcare affordable and accessible for everyone. I believe we need to stop giving corporations and the wealthiest few massive tax breaks and bailouts, and start funding social services that people depend on. And as your next governor, I’ll do everything I can to make it happen. **Tomorrow, we’re coming up on our mid-month deadline, and we haven’t reached our goal yet.** **[Can you pitch in any amount today to help me fight for you as Iowa’s next Governor and ensure every Iowan can thrive?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32394659/295629685/2118730081?refcode=fl_email_fr_20210714midmonth1_rs_full_xx_l2&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODg5NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkMjUzNGU1Ni1kNGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=r99xHrYUjQ8ybGw1sMw6Ej7Sf_CXKwMi8R8WCBRshkI=)** | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:
---

clean_body: | = Friend, Right now, we have billionaires dumping untold amounts of money into a private space race, competing to literally get out of this world. Billionaires who pay little or absolutely nothing in taxes to support our infrastructure and social services. Meanwhile, we have people all over the country, including right here in Iowa, who are struggling just to get by — folks who are wondering how they’re going to pay next month’s rent, who can’t afford to keep the refrigerator and kitchen cupboards stocked with food for their families, or who are scraping by to pay their student loans or medical bills. In this country, we’ve empowered the uber-wealthy to make so much money they can build rockets to space, while far too many people lack access to the basic necessities to survive. There’s something very wrong with that picture. = I believe we should be paying teachers more and investing in our kids’ public schools. I believe we should make healthcare affordable and accessible for everyone. I believe we need to stop giving corporations and the wealthiest few massive tax breaks and bailouts, and start funding social services that people depend on. And as your next governor, I’ll do everything I can to make it happen. Tomorrow, we’re coming up on our mid-month deadline, and we haven’t reached our goal yet. = | If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: | | = = | = = | = = Thanks for anything you can give to help us change this broken system. The work starts here at home. — Ras | Paid for by Ras Smith for Governor Ras Smith for Governor P. O. Box 1651 Waterloo, IA 50704 United States If you believe you received this message in error or wish to no longer receive email from us, please .
