body:
there is too much at stake for our fight to fail now. | Peter - Our majority in Washington is razor-thin. **And now Trump and his cronies are threatening to seize power in 2022.** The RNC has almost $80 million in the bank to fund their takeover and start their battle for Trump’s next presidential bid. But with only 48 hours until our mid-month fundraising deadline, we noticed your name was missing from our donor list. | **DEADLINE: 48 HOURS** **NAME:** Peter **EMAIL:** dpwillis67@gmail.com **LAST DONATION:** **MISSING** **[We must stop Trump and his cronies from seizing power in Washington, donate $10 or what you can now>>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32395170/295632463/-1089539254?refcode=em_UTC__MM2_071421_box&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNDM4ZmIzLWQ1ZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-anmn4BgbntVxlPC24aEqloNdf3hv_vjFkEG--6EtKQ=)** | **[DONATE](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32395174/295632465/-1089539254?refcode=em_UTC__MM2_071421_boxbutton&amount=10&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNS8xLzc4OTg3IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjhhNDM4ZmIzLWQ1ZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=-anmn4BgbntVxlPC24aEqloNdf3hv_vjFkEG--6EtKQ=)**
---

name: Dr. Kim Schrier
subject: Cutting childhood poverty in half
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress
body:
Across Washington State, nearly 200,000 children under the age of 18 are living in poverty. Childhood poverty has devastating impacts on families, with these children often facing increased stress, health issues, hunger, and housing instability. [ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32395251/295632551/693975070?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQzOGZiMy1kNWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uu-45HdVte4waj8J1U4la3LmuJpCG3b101Qu5-vlxos=&emci=6a5ad68d-03e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78438fb3-d5e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)
---
Peter,

Across Washington State, nearly 200,000 children under the age of 18 are living in poverty. Childhood poverty has devastating impacts on families, with these children often facing increased stress, health issues, hunger, and housing instability.

And it's not just a problem in Washington State -- 1 in 6 American children live in poverty.

The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated the crisis of childhood poverty in our country, which is why my Democratic House colleagues and I took action. I was proud to help pass the American Rescue Plan earlier this year. **As the only pediatrician in Congress, I made sure the plan included several provisions to improve the lives of children, including the Child Tax Credit expansion.**

For middle-class families, the monthly tax credit will help with the costs of after school care, tutoring, and extracurriculars. For the millions of working families living paycheck to paycheck, these monthly payments will help provide financial security and stability for children, reduce stress, and improve long-term outcomes.

Child Tax Credit payments of up to $300 per month per child are beginning on July 15 and will help millions of American families -- including almost 80% of the children in Washington's 8th District. We are talking about more than 150,000 children. **This historic investment in our families is expected to cut child poverty in half.**

If you meet the eligibility requirements and filed your tax return in 2019 or 2020, you will automatically receive this payment. **[Click here for more information about the Child Tax Credit](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32395255/295632555/1160308630?emci=b4fa2acc-5edf-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=4d20b2dd-65df-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=3781835&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQzOGZiMy1kNWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uu-45HdVte4waj8J1U4la3LmuJpCG3b101Qu5-vlxos=)** , or visit the **[IRS's website to see if you're eligible to receive payments, and to update your information.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32395259/295632559/-510701710?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMzAvMS85MTExMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ODQzOGZiMy1kNWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=uu-45HdVte4waj8J1U4la3LmuJpCG3b101Qu5-vlxos=&emci=6a5ad68d-03e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=78438fb3-d5e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=15820338)**

Thank you,

Kim

clean_body: Across Washington State, nearly 200,000 children under the age of 18 are living in poverty. Childhood poverty has devastating impacts on families, with these children often facing increased stress, health issues, hunger, and housing instability. Peter, Across Washington State, nearly 200,000 children under the age of 18 are living in poverty. Childhood poverty has devastating impacts on families, with these children often facing increased stress, health issues, hunger, and housing instability. And it's not just a problem in Washington State -- 1 in 6 American children live in poverty. The COVID-19 pandemic has exacerbated the crisis of childhood poverty in our country, which is why my Democratic House colleagues and I took action. I was proud to help pass the American Rescue Plan earlier this year. As the only pediatrician in Congress, I made sure the plan included several provisions to improve the lives of children, including the Child Tax Credit expansion. For middle-class families, the monthly tax credit will help with the costs of after school care, tutoring, and extracurriculars. For the millions of working families living paycheck to paycheck, these monthly payments will help provide financial security and stability for children, reduce stress, and improve long-term outcomes. Child Tax Credit payments of up to $300 per month per child are beginning on July 15 and will help millions of American families -- including almost 80% of the children in Washington's 8th District. We are talking about more than 150,000 children. This historic investment in our families is expected to cut child poverty in half. If you meet the eligibility requirements and filed your tax return in 2019 or 2020, you will automatically receive this payment. = , or visit the Thank you, Kim National Republicans have named Rep. Kim Schrier's district a top target for the midterms, so we need your help to build another winning campaign. Will you chip in to protect Kim's seat and the Democratic House majority in 2022? | = Paid for by Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress Contributions or gifts to Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress are not tax deductible. Dr. Kim Schrier for Congress PO Box 2728 Issaquah, WA 98027 United States

name: Dan Crenshaw
subject: Most important email you'll read this week
body:
---
| | | | | | |
---
| [ ](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yyjXAl40wAziG6Qe5loK94Sa_cDBjaoYaDfhc5Lh4zhgte4vpObi8D2CYqMVs_p-IxKmsIYrZ9Hmv4plrn-iZc8KCAUOZIebzTXj0zwm139EIsOhCgDk65nUiabdJzbc3gs2L8XM0EuHpk5WIaQag1IphvNJz_mH8zc3LPg6bNML0Z4ml6uIhRm1mOofWhjCPdqWK56-3WpmDbK4486E55pYOgMqIef8zIApMgYm7iIxqKAItv4ovqz3yxnqUOxFfcwWkfW8vI3vj1q48R4mw4gAO8P7CE9J1Gha6A78ldSiLa_IWmuhXwaj8l-gU_uS6BDhjJO4o5w=&c=ckp8zseoTDG-NQwnMBT8aYdiGBUfS2t7XbdV6OmzAtiypntbZ6NvRw==&ch=LhnEKkIDMZQ2Uk42ggO17u3olPnqf_r_8Ln5NNyPgE9OrHP6MH4bTw==)
---
| |
---
| Peter-
Remember that email I sent you yesterday? About the Texas House Democrats fleeing on a private jet to DC to hang out with Pelosi and effectively block debate on Texas election security reforms.
Here's my response to their claims. This is the most important email you'll read all week. Please SHARE and help me get the truth out there.
---
| | | [DONATE NOW TO SHARE THE TRUTH](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yyjXAl40wAziG6Qe5loK94Sa_cDBjaoYaDfhc5Lh4zhgte4vpObi8D2CYqMVs_p-IxKmsIYrZ9Hmv4plrn-iZc8KCAUOZIebzTXj0zwm139EIsOhCgDk65nUiabdJzbc3gs2L8XM0EuHpk5WIaQag1IphvNJz_mH8zc3LPg6bNML0Z4ml6uIhRm1mOofWhjCPdqWK56-3WpmDbK4486E55pYOgMqIef8zIApMgYm7iIxqKAItv4ovqz3yxnqUOxFfcwWkfW8vI3vj1q48R4mw4gAO8P7CE9J1Gha6A78ldSiLa_IWmuhXwaj8l-gU_uS6BDhjJO4o5w=&c=ckp8zseoTDG-NQwnMBT8aYdiGBUfS2t7XbdV6OmzAtiypntbZ6NvRw==&ch=LhnEKkIDMZQ2Uk42ggO17u3olPnqf_r_8Ln5NNyPgE9OrHP6MH4bTw==)
---
| Democrats are lying (again) about "voter suppression" in the Texas reforms. Biden (again) called them "Jim Crow" laws.
So, does anything in these bills amount to "voter suppression?" Of course not. Here's what the bills do:
1. Bans paid ballot harvesting, the practice of gathering and submitting complete absentee or mail-in voter ballots by third-party individuals, volunteers or party workers, rather than submission by voters themselves directly to ballot collection sites.
2. Requires voter ID verification for mail-in ballots in line with in-person voting. Voters can also provide the last 4 digits of their social security number if they don't have a driver's license. 80% of Americans support voter ID laws. [https://news.gallup.com/poll/194741/four-five-americans-support-voter-laws-early-voting.aspx](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yyjXAl40wAziG6Qe5loK94Sa_cDBjaoYaDfhc5Lh4zhgte4vpObi8P5RaErRcJiFsbWsSkNs9tTklOWmg6E53MqbCu-KGwDv5bd0_Tv4PQrISTPiGNkQ4LBWNQvi-h_RquQ0cTSlkYQErlcHxuAg4JEIFAd-TeK3i6xgnKoZoCT-v6CvcoAiKlY_BHQko5jg1Cldfgmf1F4B29dD5tsA82-Pf9BaRf1Z3auto0x0FEd59_jrCSvCMg==&c=ckp8zseoTDG-NQwnMBT8aYdiGBUfS2t7XbdV6OmzAtiypntbZ6NvRw==&ch=LhnEKkIDMZQ2Uk42ggO17u3olPnqf_r_8Ln5NNyPgE9OrHP6MH4bTw==)
And for those on the left who say that these requirements "suppress minority votes," the data doesn't back that up.
Voter ID has "no negative effect on registration or turnout, overall or for any group defined by race, gender, age, or party affiliation." [https://www.nber.org/papers/w25522](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yyjXAl40wAziG6Qe5loK94Sa_cDBjaoYaDfhc5Lh4zhgte4vpObi8P5RaErRcJiF7Dkxjxz3BcyCSTFq-VIxEkObh0E9hUY8s6qdPq8dPjauKSUaAEsjZK15XoBlASKgjmE8WZOOZgnph7VCK0q-vmAJezEpbcOg&c=ckp8zseoTDG-NQwnMBT8aYdiGBUfS2t7XbdV6OmzAtiypntbZ6NvRw==&ch=LhnEKkIDMZQ2Uk42ggO17u3olPnqf_r_8Ln5NNyPgE9OrHP6MH4bTw==)
3. Sets uniform voting times for early voting to reduce confusion while expanding hours on the weekend. This fixes the different voting times in different counties that confused voters.
4. Ensures accountability at the polls by allowing poll watchers to observe election workers, improving transparency and confidence in the results.
5. Strengthens the ban on unmanned mail-in drop boxes and prohibits unsolicited distribution of mail-in ballot applications by public officials.
6. Sets uniform procedures for verifying the authenticity of mail-in ballots while also giving voters the chance to correct mistakes if they are discovered.
7. Requires those assisting voters with filling out their ballots to complete a form verifying their identity and to take an oath stating that they will not try to influence a voter one way or another.
8. Ends the temporary, emergency measures that were put in place solely because of the pandemic like drive-thru voting and 24-hour early voting.
These options never existed before the pandemic, even though Democrats want you to believe we are ending a long-standing practice.
9. Does any of this amount to voter suppression? Or "Jim Crow" laws, which explicitly suppressed voters with poll taxes, literacy tests, and grandfather clauses?
Not even close. And BTW, Texas STILL has more opportunities to vote than Joe Biden's home state.
---
|
---
| So, why are Democrats lying so blatantly about these bills? Because they want to pass H.R. 1, which would prevent virtually any election security measures at the state level. It would also mandate taxpayer-funded campaign contributions and political ads for federal candidates.
And the reason they want to pass these insane policies so badly? Just ask Nancy Pelosi (hint.. because Democrats think it will help them win elections): [https://twitter.com/SRCC/status/1392185236948234243?s=20](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yyjXAl40wAziG6Qe5loK94Sa_cDBjaoYaDfhc5Lh4zhgte4vpObi8P5RaErRcJiFsr2oLm4vcdrqSyhjQjUo-WTwCpqsZs73W__cJ1sYEeP3i672sZjaW5Nq9o6dnOsv65lDLrcmX31Xegvsb3EXAZfh33G-qJG0vj_nhNrgCkRR7raPLBoKqAIx2CoT3Cd8aoJu-ib3CMk=&c=ckp8zseoTDG-NQwnMBT8aYdiGBUfS2t7XbdV6OmzAtiypntbZ6NvRw==&ch=LhnEKkIDMZQ2Uk42ggO17u3olPnqf_r_8Ln5NNyPgE9OrHP6MH4bTw==)
---
| We can't let Pelosi and the radical left get away with this. I'm counting on your support to help me share this message far and wide.
---
| | | [RUSH A DONATION NOW](https://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001yyjXAl40wAziG6Qe5loK94Sa_cDBjaoYaDfhc5Lh4zhgte4vpObi8D2CYqMVs_p-IxKmsIYrZ9Hmv4plrn-iZc8KCAUOZIebzTXj0zwm139EIsOhCgDk65nUiabdJzbc3gs2L8XM0EuHpk5WIaQag1IphvNJz_mH8zc3LPg6bNML0Z4ml6uIhRm1mOofWhjCPdqWK56-3WpmDbK4486E55pYOgMqIef8zIApMgYm7iIxqKAItv4ovqz3yxnqUOxFfcwWkfW8vI3vj1q48R4mw4gAO8P7CE9J1Gha6A78ldSiLa_IWmuhXwaj8l-gU_uS6BDhjJO4o5w=&c=ckp8zseoTDG-NQwnMBT8aYdiGBUfS2t7XbdV6OmzAtiypntbZ6NvRw==&ch=LhnEKkIDMZQ2Uk42ggO17u3olPnqf_r_8Ln5NNyPgE9OrHP6MH4bTw==)
---
| Thanks for your support.
In service,
Dan Crenshaw
---
| |
---
|
---
| | Crenshaw for Congress | 5900 Memorial Drive, Suite 215, Houston, TX 77007
---

Sent by [dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com](mailto:dan.crenshaw@crenshawforcongress.com)

name: Finance Team, Charlie Crist for Governor
subject: Introducing … our donor wall!
disclaimer_text: Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
body:
A way to publicly show your support for Charlie's campaign
|
---

| | Friend,

Today, we'd like to introduce something very special: our Team Crist donor wall.

**[By donating through this special link, the first person to give a certain amount is added to the wall for all to see! Your name will show up _directly_ on the page, linked to the amount you've generously contributed!](https://act.myngp.com/el/SsjFx5JnjoDXUkxfJvlFKQ==/4du98p7d71A74B2uhW1ufw==?refcode=20210714.2_f_1_fl)**

You can pick a number that has personal significance to you ... or you can pick a number that means something to Charlie!

For example:
* 12: Charlie's high school football number
* 15: his Wake Forest number
* 24: his birth date
* 44: commemorating his service as Florida's 44th governor
* 47: celebrating his eventual election as the 47th governor
* 1956: his birth year
* 1960: the year he moved to St. Pete
* 1974: his high school graduation year
* 1978: his FSU graduation year
* 1981: the year he graduated law school
* 1992: the year he was first elected to office
* 2000: the year he was elected education commissioner
* 2002: the year he was elected attorney general
* 2006: the year he was elected governor
* 2016: the year he was first elected to Congress
* 2022: the year of the election!

**[Pitching in to our donor wall is a great way to publicly show your support for Charlie's campaign. But hurry, you're competing with everybody else.](https://act.myngp.com/el/SsjFx5JnjoDXUkxfJvlFKQ==/4du98p7d71A74B2uhW1ufw==?refcode=20210714.2_f_1_fl)**

We'll post the first person to donate each amount as soon as we can (usually a couple of minutes after you donate). If multiple people donate to the same spot before we're able to update it, we'll only show the first one, but every donation helps us win!

Thanks so much,
Team Crist

P.S. **_If we fill up every slot, that means $4.5 million more that will go towards beating Ron DeSantis and building a Florida for All._** **[Pitch in now>>](https://act.myngp.com/el/SsjFx5JnjoDXUkxfJvlFKQ==/4du98p7d71A74B2uhW1ufw==?refcode=20210714.2_f_1_fl)**

---

---

| Paid for and approved by Charlie Crist, Democrat for Governor
---

Charlie Crist for Governor
P.O. Box 1547
St. Petersburg FL 33731 United States

name: Giffords.org
subject: Please, can you submit a letter as part of the ATF’s public comment period on ghost guns? It can really make a difference.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee
body:
We have a chance to win meaningful change on this very important issue.
#

Friends —
Recently, we wrote asking if you’d be willing to make your voice heard as part of the ATF’s official public comment period on ghost guns.
So far, thousands of people have submitted comments. However, opponents who want to keep ghost guns are currently outpacing us so we need to speak up and make our voices heard.
So can you submit your comment today? Here’s how:
**Step 1:** Use this link: [**https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2021/05/21/2021-10058/definition-of-frame-or-receiver-and-identification-of-firearms**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=1&akid=337%2E3935704%2EwFWl0n)
**Step 2:** Submit a comment of your own or use the sample comment we’ve included below.
**Step 3:** Feel good that you have done something important and meaningful in the fight to save lives from gun violence.
**\- - - COPY AND PASTE THIS SAMPLE LETTER - - -**
_I support the rule on so-called “ghost guns” that has been proposed by the Bureau of Alcohol, Tobacco, Firearms and Explosives (ATF), and I urge ATF to finalize the rule as proposed and treat ghost guns the same as other guns._
_Ghost guns are do-it-yourself firearms that can be acquired without a background check and lack serial numbers, so they cannot be traced by law enforcement. By selling the key components of firearms as intentionally unfinished rather than fully assembled firearms, ghost gun companies manage to skirt federal gun laws. Buyers who aren’t required to pass background checks can quickly and easily convert these unfinished parts into fully functional firearms using common household tools._
_As a result, nothing is stopping a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm from making a ghost gun. Ghost guns are frequently moved by traffickers because they are easier to obtain and harder to track than traditional firearms, leading to more and more ghost guns being traded in the black market and used in criminal activity. Ghost guns have been used to shoot police officers, commit mass shootings, and murder children, and extremist groups are increasingly arming themselves with these dangerous weapons._
_ATF’s proposed rule would change the definition of “firearm” to include components that are intentionally left unfinished. As a result, these parts could only be sold after a background check, and would have to be serialized. This would help stop the flow of these dangerous, untraceable weapons to people legally prohibited from possessing guns._
_This is a commonsense solution to a critically important problem. I wholly support this rule and urge its immediate adoption._
**\- - - END SAMPLE LETTER - - -**
**Once again, the link to submit the comment is here:** [**https://www.federalregister.gov/documents/2021/05/21/2021-10058/definition-of-frame-or-receiver-and-identification-of-firearms**](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=2&akid=337%2E3935704%2EwFWl0n)
We can’t stress how important this is. You have a chance to be a part of meaningful change. All you have to do is make your voice heard.
Team Giffords
**[ADD YOUR COMMENT](https://go.giffords.org/go/2272?t=3&akid=337%2E3935704%2EwFWl0n)**

Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click [here](https://go.giffords.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=4&akid=337%2E3935704%2EwFWl0n) if you'd like to unsubscribe. Giffords PAC was started to support elected officials who step up to fight the gun violence epidemic. Thank you for standing with Gabby and the Giffords team.

Buyers who aren’t required to pass background checks can quickly and easily convert these unfinished parts into fully functional firearms using common household tools. As a result, nothing is stopping a person who is prohibited from possessing a firearm from making a ghost gun. Ghost guns are frequently moved by traffickers because they are easier to obtain and harder to track than traditional firearms, leading to more and more ghost guns being traded in the black market and used in criminal activity. Ghost guns have been used to shoot police officers, commit mass shootings, and murder children, and extremist groups are increasingly arming themselves with these dangerous weapons. ATF’s proposed rule would change the definition of “firearm” to include components that are intentionally left unfinished. As a result, these parts could only be sold after a background check, and would have to be serialized. This would help stop the flow of these dangerous, untraceable weapons to people legally prohibited from possessing guns. This is a commonsense solution to a critically important problem. I wholly support this rule and urge its immediate adoption. \- - - END SAMPLE LETTER - - - Once again, the link to submit the comment is here: We can’t stress how important this is. You have a chance to be a part of meaningful change. All you have to do is make your voice heard. Team Giffords Paid For By Giffords PAC; not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. www.Giffords.org

| Dear Patriot, I just launched a new fight against the Mask Mafia. And they are NOT happy about it.

Anthony Fauci and his fellow bureaucrats refuse to let go of power – even though the pandemic is effectively over. It's disgusting how much these people crave authority. They want to micromanage your life and tell you what to do, and the only way to stop them is to confront them with the truth. That's why I'm taking a stand right now. I just introduced a bill to repeal the mask requirements on all public transportation. You shouldn’t have to suffocate while riding a plane, train, or bus -- no matter what Anthony Fauci says. This bill will take a huge step towards freeing America from the crushing tyranny of Fauci-ism. And it will bring us one step closer to erasing the terrible legacy of lockdowns and mask mandates. That's why I need you to step up and help me right now. [I need you to contribute $100, $50, $25, or $10 right away so that I can persuade my colleagues to support this bill.](https://trk.klclick1.com/ls/click?upn=hQr7hDGqseyCccILq2VRkdw43STX7p6qidVueNz0KW5wiiZKwhzIyPyftuJda6z01a4srTaRB0y0BAXUtjtX-2FodzHo9QSNLlkku40vS3zfczaHE0cmMMOWQR0EIwMyP3O9WRH4V6mkOxj68z0liICQ-3D-3DBgol_XwU9lPq5-2Bze3gI64ohlV0cQwWAuBAU7ADIvj2CS7ymjdyn9Meo-2BU4memdpyMXxi7G5yCOA7EOwRBTQpIyWPB2L-2BCNfa0GXaynQDD8apsm-2BsfDmyIJD-2BKfAqXw4eTWqAaqXY46b8YIixplEk-2BH3-2Fl409l7fPlzh3fCaygWlMxa5tWw-2FCADCNz7C5KPnShKV3grEUDVWBuXwhIjEas1hk2u01EKo3MBz5ADk-2F1FtsCGzX-2BQ9IYp8WrzBvT-2FBahbWj-2FDx-2BhnCtlKwPGZIqFCA11VeWi37h81CIPokXDYVyAudmTviOHLy8JMzMqsgojvR0JfYz4XbgXEBMQWb4KkEaQFO5ky89a3wAldFSaStOFw5cb9aBALylgJKfKGHwYWX4O5x27RLtR6BmVxPDGOEFwPA-3D-3D) Once you have contributed, I hope you'll watch my appearance on Laura Ingraham from this past weekend talking about the mask mandates.

subject: I’m running because the next U.S. Senator from Wisconsin should:

body:

| | At this point, we know the type of Senator that Ron Johnson is — a fraud comfortable with spreading deadly lies and openly attacking American democracy.

But today, I’m writing this email to let you know what I stand for. I’m running because the next U.S. Senator from Wisconsin should:
* Support workers rights and unions (I even wrote a book this year about how I helped the local union save a paper mill in my home state)
* Champion Medicare For All & the Green New Deal
* End the filibuster to get progressive policies passed
* Fight to break up Wall Street firms that prey on workers and rig the tax code
* Get corporate money out of our politics
* Break up corporate monopolies to give our small businesses and family farmers a fair shot to compete
* Defend women’s rights
* Stand up for the LGBTQ community
* Tax the rich to make them pay their fair share. _The Jeff Bezoses of the world have enough megayachts and personal rocket ships._

**These issues are what I care deeply about, and I will do everything in my power to fight on behalf of working folks like you in the Senate._But we’re in this together._ Your support _right here, right now,_ could help ensure we defeat Ron Johnson in 2022.**

[As one of the only non-millionaires in this race, I’m asking for your support. In these summer months, we need to keep up with our millionaire opponents, including Ron Johnson, who married into a billionaire family. To do that, we need to raise $8,000 by Friday at midnight. The people of Wisconsin deserve better. If you’re ready for a Senator who will serve _everyone_ , chip in to my campaign now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32396409/295636252/217346270?amount=10&refcode=TN_EM_FR_1MO_210714_1_1&refcode2=194ca58f-d9e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDYvMS84Njk2MCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxOTRjYTU4Zi1kOWU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=1gAobCAo6ZMTeM6s2bt6WmTT1HoSXAnQAWA57yWGzc4=) | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately.

Right now, the GOP, including Senator Johnson, are not even focused on the issues that matter most to everyday Americans. They’re more concerned about restricting your right to vote and rewriting the history of January 6 than trying to win on the issues. Frankly, these attempts to pass voter suppression bills in states like Wisconsin are un-American. _Just look at what’s happening with the Texas lawmakers fleeing their state to protect people’s right to vote._

Disagreeing politically is normal, but it’s another thing entirely to actively work to undermine American democracy. That’s what the GOP is doing across the country. And this type of unpatriotic behavior is exactly why we need to fire Senators like Ron Johnson next year.

clean_body: | | At this point, we know the type of Senator that Ron Johnson is — a fraud comfortable with spreading deadly lies and openly attacking American democracy. But today, I’m writing this email to let you know what I stand for. I’m running because the next U.S. Senator from Wisconsin should: Support workers rights and unions (I even wrote a book this year about how I helped the local union save a paper mill in my home state) Champion Medicare For All & the Green New Deal End the filibuster to get progressive policies passed Fight to break up Wall Street firms that prey on workers and rig the tax code Get corporate money out of our politics Break up corporate monopolies to give our small businesses and family farmers a fair shot to compete Defend women’s rights Stand up for the LGBTQ community Tax the rich to make them pay their fair share. The Jeff Bezoses of the world have enough megayachts and personal rocket ships. These issues are what I care deeply about, and I will do everything in my power to fight on behalf of working folks like you in the Senate.But we’re in this together. Your support right here, right now, could help ensure we defeat Ron Johnson in 2022. = | If you've stored your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will be processed immediately. | = | = | = | = | = | = Right now, the GOP, including Senator Johnson, are not even focused on the issues that matter most to everyday Americans. They’re more concerned about restricting your right to vote and rewriting the history of January 6 than trying to win on the issues. Frankly, these attempts to pass voter suppression bills in states like Wisconsin are un-American. Just look at what’s happening with the Texas lawmakers fleeing their state to protect people’s right to vote. Disagreeing politically is normal, but it’s another thing entirely to actively work to undermine American democracy. That’s what the GOP is doing across the country. And this type of unpatriotic behavior is exactly why we need to fire Senators like Ron Johnson next year. = | = Thank you for your support, Tom Nelson | | | | = Tom Nelson serves as County Executive for Outagamie, one of the worst-hit COVID areas in the nation. We have big news: U.S. News named the Florida Governor’s race as one of the 8 most competitive in the country last week.

This confirms what we’ve known for months: Floridians are fed up with Ron DeSantis and ready for something new.

Nikki is the only Democrat to win statewide since 2012. She knows how to win this race—but only with your help. Click here to chip in now and help us stop Ron DeSantis. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/eseat-in-play]

Thanks to supporters like you, we can do this. We’re so grateful to have you on our team.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Mark=20Finchem?=
subject: 🚨 IMPORTANT ELECTION AUDIT UPDATE 🚨
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE
body:
News breaking constantly now |
---
| | [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=56aedf10c2&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| | Dear ,
**_IMPORTANT ELECTION AUDIT UPDATE_**
Did you see me on Victory News, Kenneth Copeland’s faith-based news program?

My name is Mark Finchem. I am a State Representative for the State of Arizona and the leading Conservative candidate to take over Corrupt Secretary of State Hobbs job in Arizona in 2022!

**I have been a pioneer and leader in the vast grassroots movement that is election integrity. In fact, I have been called the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative.**

Right now, the water is on the stove and it is simmering, and millions of patriots around the country are just waiting for it to boil.

_Yes, I am talking about the results of America’s Audit in Maricopa County, Arizona._

**In fact, this is why I was invited on to Kenneth Copeland’s faith based news network. To talk about the election integrity movements spreading like wildfire around the country. **

** _And why me? Because since I first put my boots on the ground and got the Maricopa County Audit running, I have been recognized as the chief authority on the Election Integrity movement around the nation._**

And this is why I am writing to you today...

_To give you an inside look as to what to expect to unfold in the coming months, all you have to do is keep reading below._

And what I need you to understand is this: Right now we are at a **critical** moment in the history of this country. Not only with the election audit, but with the countless elections around the country to install secretary of state’s that will serve the people, not the corrupt swamp – and will defend the integrity of our elections!

**And if we do not win this VERY important race in 2022, our elections will be left at the mercy of the Democrats, and if there is anything that I learned from 2020 – the Democrats will stop at literally nothing to win.**

[This is why I need your help](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=e83cd2cfd6&e=44b8c466b0). Every dollar raised today will go to getting the message of election integrity out around the country so that we can win the election for Secretary of State and save our elections!

[_Please donate as much as you can to fight against the Radical Left who are stealing our elections!_](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=86588ab82f&e=44b8c466b0)
---
|
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=d8057f66a4&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| ***SPREAD THE AUDIT***
As we speak, we have boots on the ground pushing to spread the Election Audit around the country.

**I already have travel planned to Washington in October, where we are pressing for a public hearing on election integrity.**

_We are also pressing in crucial swing state Pennsylvania to bring the truth to light!_
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=67d5ca241e&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| And if there’s one thing I know about Senator Mastriano, he will be like a pit bull on a porkchop with the election audit.

_We WILL get to the bottom of this._
---
|
---
| Can you see it? Do you see what is happening?

**The Election Integrity mission is spreading around the country like wildfire.**

**_[Will you join us on our mission?](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=3be1fc6963&e=44b8c466b0)_**

_[Donate $100, $250, $500 or more today to protect American Democracy and support my campaign!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=5af317235a&e=44b8c466b0)_
***JOIN THE MISSION***
**I am going to bottom-line this for you.**

**_We are finishing the most thorough election audit in history. Double-checking, Triple-checking... as many times as it takes to prove without a doubt what we knew all along. The 2020 election was stolen._**

We know that enemies will emerge out of the woodwork when the results are tabulated and released.

They already are. I and countless Election Integrity patriots like myself have been attacked, ridiculed, and challenged in every way imaginable.

**Imagine the onslaught when we catch them red-handed.**

[And this is why I need your support today.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=1b61456f4b&e=44b8c466b0) We are in an all-out brawl with those who would have us believe that America is evil, and that elections are meant to be stolen. [Without your support, we simply can’t win.](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=a350f19f04&e=44b8c466b0)

**And at the end of the day, I have a few very strong convictions I want to share with you before I say goodbye until next time:**
* **If the Democrats were so darn sure that this election was the “safest and most secure ever,” then they would embrace the opportunity to assist in the audit, not challenge it at every turn.**
* **Any institution that receives public funding, schools, the police, even banks, are routinely audited by regulators – with the exception of elections. What makes elections different?**

Here’s the deal folks, this tells me without a shadow of a doubt that Corrupt Katie Hobbs and her Democrat cronies got something to hide and something up their sleeve.

**And we better be prepared. We know the Democrats wills top at nothing.**

And when that time comes, will you be in our corner?

_[Donate TODAY to join the movement and support my campaign!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=2880cf8d02&e=44b8c466b0)_
_***JOIN THE MOVEMENT***_
---
| [Thank you for your support!](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=631830f901&e=44b8c466b0)

God Bless You,
---
| [ ](https://votefinchem.us1.list-manage.com/track/click?u=a653829701c13e4a704cb19bf&id=6a93ad608b&e=44b8c466b0)
---
| Mark Finchem

Arizona House of Representatives – District 11
Republican for Arizona Secretary of State
Conservative
Election Integrity Patriot

I have been a pioneer and leader in the vast grassroots movement that is election integrity. In fact, I have been called the ORIGINAL “Election Integrity” Conservative. Right now, the water is on the stove and it is simmering, and millions of patriots around the country are just waiting for it to boil. Yes, I am talking about the results of America’s Audit in Maricopa County, Arizona. In fact, this is why I was invited on to Kenneth Copeland’s faith based news network. To talk about the election integrity movements spreading like wildfire around the country. And why me? Because since I first put my boots on the ground and got the Maricopa County Audit running, I have been recognized as the chief authority on the Election Integrity movement around the nation. And this is why I am writing to you today... To give you an inside look as to what to expect to unfold in the coming months, all you have to do is keep reading below. And what I need you to understand is this: Right now we are at a critical moment in the history of this country. Not only with the election audit, but with the countless elections around the country to install secretary of state’s that will serve the people, not the corrupt swamp – and will defend the integrity of our elections! And if we do not win this VERY important race in 2022, our elections will be left at the mercy of the Democrats, and if there is anything that I learned from 2020 – the Democrats will stop at literally nothing to win. . Every dollar raised today will go to getting the message of election integrity out around the country so that we can win the election for Secretary of State and save our elections! | | | *SPREAD THE AUDIT As we speak, we have boots on the ground pushing to spread the Election Audit around the country. I already have travel planned to Washington in October, where we are pressing for a public hearing on election integrity. We are also pressing in crucial swing state Pennsylvania to bring the truth to light! | | And if there’s one thing I know about Senator Mastriano, he will be like a pit bull on a porkchop with the election audit. We WILL get to the bottom of this. | | Can you see it? Do you see what is happening? The Election Integrity mission is spreading around the country like wildfire. JOIN THE MISSION I am going to bottom-line this for you. We are finishing the most thorough election audit in history. Double-checking, Triple-checking... as many times as it takes to prove without a doubt what we knew all along. The 2020 election was stolen. We know that enemies will emerge out of the woodwork when the results are tabulated and released. They already are. I and countless Election Integrity patriots like myself have been attacked, ridiculed, and challenged in every way imaginable. Imagine the onslaught when we catch them red-handed. We are in an all-out brawl with those who would have us believe that America is evil, and that elections are meant to be stolen. And at the end of the day, I have a few very strong convictions I want to share with you before I say goodbye until next time: If the Democrats were so darn sure that this election was the “safest and most secure ever,” then they would embrace the opportunity to assist in the audit, not challenge it at every turn. Any institution that receives public funding, schools, the police, even banks, are routinely audited by regulators – with the exception of elections. What makes elections different? Here’s the deal folks, this tells me without a shadow of a doubt that Corrupt Katie Hobbs and her Democrat cronies got something to hide and something up their sleeve. And we better be prepared. We know the Democrats wills top at nothing. And when that time comes, will you be in our corner? JOIN THE MOVEMENT | God Bless You, | | Mark Finchem Arizona House of Representatives – District 11 Republican for Arizona Secretary of State Conservative Election Integrity Patriot PAID FOR BY FINCHEM FOR SECRETARY OF STATE | | | Copyright © 2021 Mark Finchem for Secretary of State, All rights reserved. Our mailing address is:** Mark Finchem for Secretary of StatePO Box 69344Oro Valley, AZ 85737 Want to change how you receive these emails? You can or .

name: Jim Jordan
subject: We need to stop apologizing for the United States.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jim Jordan for Congress
body:
This is still the United States. The greatest country in the world. We need to stop apologizing and act like it. [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c299%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=ksvIkmhWrtbreWgxNwINdQ&sysid=1)
.

| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4939%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=pPibAMSDreDWGp%2b7sxJl9w&sysid=1)
---

Fellow American,

Olympic athletes are turning their back to the American flag.

The White House press secretary JUST said that the Biden Administration would “**certainly** ” support states if future lockdowns are “necessary.”

The far left has called it a “**national disgrace** ” for demanding answers from Dr. Fauci re: the origins of coronavirus.

[**HELP ME FIGHT THE ATTACKS ➞**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4930%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cx%2bxLv0OYa4jD%2ftGjGByQA&sysid=1)
It only took six months for the radical left to attempt to make their intentions completely clear: they hate what America stands for and will go to any length possible to destroy the country from within.

I can handle the attacks, but **_our country cannot withstand another two years of unified Democrat control in Congress_**. The truth is, when we’re attacked from by the far Left, it only motivates us to defend this great country even more.

We’re at loggerheads with the Left, and we need **[your immediate help](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4931%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=ep1%2bErMbTn%2fS%2f%2fkqT%2babBw&sysid=1)** to fight back against the fake news and lies they’re spreading about us and the GOP.

Please consider a**[gift of $5 or more right now](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4932%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=woPQWgW1RlF%2bPVwuR%2bSJCQ&sysid=1)** to help us amplify our message. We must ensure that they know their lies won’t go unanswered.

[**HELP ME FIGHT THE ATTACKS ➞**](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4930%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=Cx%2bxLv0OYa4jD%2ftGjGByQA&sysid=1)

**[We’ve set a goal of raising $10,000 by the end of the day today, and I sure would appreciate any help you’re able to give right now](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4933%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=c6U4uCQFb%2bWnY01rgvBGTQ&sysid=1)**.

Thank you,

name: MarkKelly.com
subject: CNN just dropped this news on us
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
#

Friends —
CNN just named us one of the 10 Senate seats most likely to flip in 2022, and to make things worse, Mark now has FOUR Republican opponents running to take back this seat. And the most recent opponent to jump in has a $10 million Super PAC backing his campaign.
We made history in Arizona when we won in 2020, but now Mark needs your help to hold this seat and secure a full six-year term in the Senate.
This is even more critical now that a Mitch McConnell-aligned Super PAC has spent millions on ads in Arizona to attack us.
So we need to keep up the pace in order to hit our July fundraising goals and we haven’t brought in as many contributions as we’d hoped today. So here’s the deal:
We need you to become a new supporter to help us get one step closer to hitting our goal.
Normally most first time contributors chip in $5. If you would consider contributing $10 we’ll be where we need to be to hit our goal so we can keep Mark in the Senate.
[**So what do you say? Can you make a $10 donation towards our July fundraising deadline? We need your help to hit our goal so we can generate the resources to hold this seat.**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210714-1-15&t=1&refcode2=945_6688874_S9-sEa&akid=945%2E6688874%2ES9-sEa)
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210714-1-15&t=2&refcode2=945_6688874_S9-sEa&akid=945%2E6688874%2ES9-sEa)**
With everyone pitching in just a little more, we’ll hit our goal and be ready for anything that happens, as we work day in and day out to hold this seat and fight for progress that will improve people’s lives.
So thank you in advance for chipping in!
All our best,
Team Kelly
**[DONATE NOW](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mek-em-july21?refcode=em210714-1-15&t=3&refcode2=945_6688874_S9-sEa&akid=945%2E6688874%2ES9-sEa)**

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=4&akid=945%2E6688874%2ES9-sEa).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

name: Ryan Girdusky
subject: What Tucker Carlson said...
disclaimer_text: Paid for by 1776 Project PAC
body:
[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=774b01356b874f1b9ac475785c0a68c5&_e=JDvNuYl97EzOiBVzftguhhy2rAF1k16xW4aJLwtHmBAdWcVZ14EHxPEG0hxS-9mJsI30DnrnQfVIlqFkuY8Uwhet8HJT_8cVIk41PoPFCzC8sZ89Gie1Yuw-L6oTTBE9-NBDPoUSxb2Wa9M3fKEd3wlAOmn-xwOKWh0eFEFUWgStBFTzosg2H45RmY0gFsb87R_JilvLWlijEUQ29KfGuP0zaAM07YXJIx1Dbsfyb6z_ePMwIs2Sp8jIS_zuNxQ7pT0ODC8pVv_Z9t2ZmGN_1BbX1m03RQ3hq-YcEN8tdGCzzGLbkQiLf0yabMc4yyIViFlWIV2iPwWNfdfgWASJ1MBpmG69OmqU7lH7UI1fTHQ6zrxucMqoP_u662ROR9SY_gVsUFgsAZYVSX94b1omYb7u5XVlYd8zHHnIKw7CWqYuqT73DON7INJbmmCSg2zHVpuzzVF6GyMRvvRvEkNmNoTI1PoQ2hmfcpai4g7xF2tISMIFoLUzY2U9_xYrZ65s) Tucker Carlson said it himself: if you’re thinking of writing a check...think of writing it to Ryan Girdusky. I’ll tell you why. I’ve seen what’s happening in our schools -- on our dimes, and I’m sure you have too. All over the country, teachers are brainwashing children to hate themselves and hate their country. They tell students that if they’re white they’re evil racists responsible for slavery, and if they’re black they’re helpless victims that will never accomplish anything. _It’s state sanctioned racism, plain and simple._ **And it doesn’t matter how old you are, or how long your own children have been out of school -- we all have a leg in this race.** ** ** **[Which is why I’m asking you to make an urgent donation of $35 or more today to help us fight the spread of Critical Race Theory and elect conservatives who care about the truth.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=774b01356b874f1b9ac475785c0a68c5&_e=JDvNuYl97EzOiBVzftguhhy2rAF1k16xW4aJLwtHmBAdWcVZ14EHxPEG0hxS-9mJsI30DnrnQfVIlqFkuY8Uwhet8HJT_8cVIk41PoPFCzC8sZ89Gie1Yuw-L6oTTBE9-NBDPoUSxb2Wa9M3fKEd3wlAOmn-xwOKWh0eFEFUWgStBFTzosg2H45RmY0gFsb87R_JilvLWlijEUQ29KfGuP0zaAM07YXJIx1Dbsfyb6z_ePMwIs2Sp8jIS_zuNxQ7pT0ODC8pVv_Z9t2ZmGN_1BbX1m03RQ3hq-YcEN8tdGBFYCVFwY1o7vbIXr0KaNuvnf7prCUiUW7Osw11fMkxr3eJo_oZRK_Ent-0XcGH02yo3vCkfMT3yFBrtZ_mObFn5UNMvcw9y62F3shhEi5cFO4oYAJVOXiYo6gzWAZUkfwGWIJGXv_LKs_jcQc1lGyGww73U24_SgaFkdBu2LYYAf2ywSPSVy_KlxdWDvYn0fKk1x4NNC6UchVlfWsXxDcr)** Because if the radical Left succeeds in brainwashing an entire generation, America won’t survive. _The generation taught to hate our country from kindergarten to college will be the one that destroys it._ They will beg our leaders to strip us of our rights and freedoms until we have none left. They will run our country into the ground and create chaos and despair where we once had prosperity and excellence. **They will surrender our country to Marxism, and we may never get it back.** The sacrifices of our forefathers will have been for nothing, our wars will have been fought for nothing, and our proud history will be reduced to nothing. name: Sara Jacobs
subject: fighting for American families and workers
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Sara Jacobs for Congress
body:
This work is crucial. But in order to keep moving forward, Democrats have to hold the House majority in 2022 — and that means we can’t afford to lose a single seat.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32400450/295652951/343728020?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210714-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDNjMjMyYi1lN2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V08HzWfGzZkNck1YirxbzJ7nVedZCkawz3-f6xbaLwk=)
---
| Friend,

I am honored and humbled to share that I am one of just eight Democrats – and the only freshman Representative – to be appointed by Speaker Nancy Pelosi to the newly created Select Committee on Economic Disparity and Fairness in Growth.

This Select Committee, modeled on President Roosevelt’s Temporary National Economic Committee established during the Great Depression, will focus on the widening wealth and income disparity in the United States and how we can create an economy that works for everyone.

Since I was sworn in earlier this year, I have been keenly focused on tackling childhood poverty and our child care crisis and making sure that our recovery from COVID-19 is equitable and prioritizes the needs of women, who have left the workforce at alarming rates. I am honored to be continuing that work on this committee — to ensure that we’re getting assistance to kids and families and addressing the ways inequality will exist and grow in the future.

As Speaker Pelosi said when she announced the Committee, “Everybody has to think that they and their families will have a better future than their parents. And when that is dulled, again, it’s not good for a country.”

**This work is crucial. But in order to keep moving forward, Democrats have to hold the House majority in 2022 — and that means we can’t afford to lose a single seat.

[_Will you chip in any amount today to help keep Democrats in the House majority and keep defending American workers and families? Any amount makes a difference!_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32400451/295652952/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210714-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDNjMjMyYi1lN2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V08HzWfGzZkNck1YirxbzJ7nVedZCkawz3-f6xbaLwk=)**
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32400452/295652953/-182076786?refcode=BLU-SJC-20210714-1-EM&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84OTMxMyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJhZDNjMjMyYi1lN2U0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=V08HzWfGzZkNck1YirxbzJ7nVedZCkawz3-f6xbaLwk=)

In gratitude,
Sara Jacobs

| | We’re about to hit an incredible milestone, Derek. Right now we’re only $40,000 away from reaching $2 million raised online. I’m blown away. Karen wants to be transparent with you, and that means sharing the good news and the bad news. We just checked our ActBlue, and after a strong start to the month -- our fundraising has plummeted: [](https://act.myngp.com/el/H5e6C8QiHfapk32fTyNWORxcogFI3LMXrcj_yZqC8Ro=/U69wrv4k3BwByT1Zd97XlB7VzzUbJbMGHq0-h0CxzWE=?gpsid=39_132_19699&refcode=em21_210714_mm1_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210714_mm1_fnd_gq_act__kbft_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kbass) Our campaign is facing a mid-month deadline Friday at midnight, and we're dangerously close to missing our $5,000 fundraising goal.

body:
On January 6, 2021, a violent pro-Trump mob stormed our nation's Capitol as legislators met to certify the results of the presidential election. Just hours after the attack, which left five dead and dozens injured, 147 members of Congress voted to reject the election results. [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32402505/295659671/-2023352048?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNDA0NWQ2LWVlZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0X7JBw8ZJmLSYTao6FFHSXGSDByf-RfnO1cHRKKtEQ=&emci=c6a5fd8b-1ce4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=0c4045d6-eee4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=16335001) _Never Again PAC is working to hold the most dangerous elected officials accountable for their attacks on our democracy and we're counting on supporters like you to help us do it. If you'd rather not hear from our team, you can[unsubscribe](https://email.everyaction.com/unsubscribeUnique/c6a5fd8b-1ce4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7/0c4045d6-eee4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNDA0NWQ2LWVlZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0X7JBw8ZJmLSYTao6FFHSXGSDByf-RfnO1cHRKKtEQ=&id=117934094) now._ Team,

On January 6, 2021, a violent pro-Trump mob stormed our nation's Capitol as legislators met to certify the results of the presidential election. Just hours after the attack, which left five dead and dozens injured, **147 members of Congress voted to reject the election results.**

The actions of the mobs and these members of Congress prove that "Trumpism" and "American Fascism" aren't going away anytime soon. The way we move past this dark chapter in our nation's history, and ensure it never happens again, is by holding those responsible for the violence and attacks on our democracy accountable.

**That's what we at Never Again PAC are here to do.**

Never Again PAC is working to hold the most dangerous and radical elected officials accountable for destabilizing our democracy. We're showing them that their actions have consequences and the people they've been elected to serve won't stand for any attack on our democracy.

We're working to kick the "Treason Caucus" members out of office, and replace them with leaders who will be faithful stewards and protectors of our cherished democratic principles. But we can't do it alone.

**[Watch our video to learn more about Never Again PAC, then chip in to join us in protecting our democracy>>](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32402506/295659673/-1532398006?gpsid=8_131_18810&refcode=em21_210713_ws1_fnd_gq_nelson__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210713_ws1_fnd_gq_nelson__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nap&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNDA0NWQ2LWVlZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0X7JBw8ZJmLSYTao6FFHSXGSDByf-RfnO1cHRKKtEQ=)** | [](https://click.everyaction.com/k/32402508/295659676/-1532398006?gpsid=8_131_18810&refcode=em21_210713_ws1_fnd_gq_nelson__nap_ettx&utm_campaign=em21_210713_ws1_fnd_gq_nelson__nap_ettx&utm_medium=email&utm_source=nap&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAwNy8xLzkwMTkwIiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjBjNDA0NWQ2LWVlZTQtZWIxMS1hN2FkLTUwMWFjNTdiOGZhNyIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=G0X7JBw8ZJmLSYTao6FFHSXGSDByf-RfnO1cHRKKtEQ=)

Peter,

clean_body: We're nowhere near where we need to be if we're going to meet the latest fundraising goals set for us by D.C. | Peter, I'm having a bit of a panic this morning. It's already July 14th (nearly midmonth), and we're nowhere near where we need to be if we're going to meet the latest fundraising goals set for us by D.C. This seems to be a constant struggle for us, but somehow, we seem to pull it together at the last minute- but . Would you to help us get back on track and remain in the good graces of the RNC for a couple more days, at least? We're having a mid-month check-in tonight at 9pm EDT, and I really don't want to have to report that we haven't even raised 30% of our July goal yet. We had such a spectacular fundraising month in June - we broke all of our previous records - and it would be such a shame to fall so far, so quickly. - | | | ---|---|--- | | Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. name: Whitney Holt
subject: The most honest fundraising email you’ll read
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Spanberger for Congress
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/tND9kB6YoWEwwo7r5_Ydk9VdHn85bweB-8cY19wIdBo=/QBpG6_YwhcCW2uTDgWSHrCW8TWCEjUZUQMl485LgojY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210714-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| Peter,

I'm Whitney, Abigail's finance director.

If you're anything like me, your email inbox is regularly inundated with fundraising emails with subject lines like "please, let me explain!" issuing desperate pleas for support.

**I 'm doing something different here -- I want to write you an honest note before asking for your assistance.**

My job is to raise funds to power our campaign (and since March 2020, I've done it while simultaneously providing virtual learning support for my three school-aged children!). You may feel like it's a long way from Election Day 2022, and I understand that. But this is not an ordinary race and this is not an ordinary election cycle.
* Abigail's race in 2020 was one of the **top 5 closest Congressional races** in the country.

* The margin Democrats hold in the House is the **narrowest it 's ever been since before the Civil War.**

* National Republicans have **already started running attack ads** in our district.

* Multiple Republicans have **launched their campaigns to defeat Abigail.**

I grew up in the district and I've been on Team Spanberger since 2018, and I am certain 2022 is going to be the hardest election we've faced yet. **There is a very real chance that control of the House could come down to Abigail 's seat.** Congressional races are expensive to run. Every election, both sides raise and spend more than the cycle before. And outside groups play an outsized role in this spending -- **outside groups spent over $15,000,000 in VA-07 in 2020!**

Now, these groups are already spending. They've run TV ads attacking Abigail and they're running ads online. **They 're making it clear that this race is at the top of their list.**

[_**I know it seems like the election is far down the road, but contributing today helps put us in a strong position to win in 2022. Will you help our campaign succeed by contributing now?**_](https://act.myngp.com/el/tND9kB6YoWEwwo7r5_Ydk9VdHn85bweB-8cY19wIdBo=/QBpG6_YwhcCW2uTDgWSHrCW8TWCEjUZUQMl485LgojY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210714-1-EM&amount=25)
---
| [CONTRIBUTE ](https://act.myngp.com/el/tND9kB6YoWEwwo7r5_Ydk9VdHn85bweB-8cY19wIdBo=/QBpG6_YwhcCW2uTDgWSHrCW8TWCEjUZUQMl485LgojY=?refcode=BLU-SPAN-20210714-1-EM&amount=25)
---
Together, we will win in 2022.
_Whitney_

* * *

Peter,

subject: “Devout and diverse” (thought you’d find this interesting, Friend)
body:
[](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/BC.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c612934%7c291%7c6%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz%7c1&wdmdk=dfFOKx3twuUMZ7NWKqx0PA&sysid=1)
---
| | | | | | | | | [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4057%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iGw1LNqy6%2bzbYlX8mjKQew&sysid=1)
---
| Fellow Conservative,
---
| Hey Friend -- thought you’d find this interesting:

A new study from Pew breaks out the different “political classifications” of each party... outlining the four core voter groups per party and what they believe.

**[Take a look:](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4058%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=cokal0VgHFTGRukEb7%2fJ%2fA&sysid=1 "Take a look:")**
---
| [](http://click.greatamericaupdate.com/Pages/Click.aspx?ghff34ghj=41%7c4057%7c612934%7c1%7cqcjvyyvf12%40tznvy.pbz&wdmdk=iGw1LNqy6%2bzbYlX8mjKQew&sysid=1)
---
| One that caught my eye? **“Devout and diverse” Democrats.** (Basically, churchgoing Black and Hispanic Christians.)

If you look at the chart, you can see how stark it is: **this group is _much_ more conservative than literally all other Democrats.** Heck, on the actual issues, they’re actually more conservative than some _Republican_ groups.

More likely to be pro-life. More likely to support border security. More likely to oppose the globalist agenda.
I bring this up, because this is core to our mission at Red Renaissance: **REACH conservative Democrats in minority communities** ... who have always pulled the lever for Team Blue without even realizing _why_ ... and **win their support for conservative candidates.** I’m a Black conservative from Baltimore, Friend. I know my community. I know how conservative Black Americans think... and **I know how to win them over.**

**The only thing Red Renaissance doesn’t yet have? The resources to take this fight national.**

name: Bobby Jindal
subject: Biden’s Shrewd Infrastructure Strategy
body:
The split bill is good for him. It complicates life and minimizes losses for congressional Democrats. [](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=83b299a9f10e4986b140353159a813cb&_e=jzw3eODXxbloNJoK2dp469d4c9d_4ojfJXEJwMwr92saf-AvKxyg9L-tsPFrG_AyMSFe0A0OL0U60Le8ZqbWsyk7RsqM-MLRYr0hH97FgvgDmUcNcFlWfkkLeVb9R2OnDHtelsFplgovn5dF3WJXVLlf0Xi5tQwpWTgWNGz-0KD6uCC2DHlvF3aFybmZUymYLMKaq0V8VFqZvJ9McXr9aRzOe9WhiLylkiJl0ea6MvO2jIMog45umZULuPNq55nxDiisVcRZV1xFCrYZMqrV9w%3D%3D) | |
---
Biden’s Shrewd Infrastructure Strategy

By Bobby Jindal
The split bill is good for him. It complicates life and minimizes losses for congressional Democrats.
|
---
President Biden’s insistence on splitting his infrastructure package into two bills—one bipartisan, the second to be passed along party lines—is good for him but will make life complicated for congressional Democrats. Mr. Biden can get credit for trying to enact his party’s most extreme positions, while not paying the price for succeeding politically as Barack Obama did in 2010.

Conservatives shouldn’t rejoice about the policy implications. By using executive action, Mr. Biden will go further left than any predecessor, but not as far as Rep. Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez and Sen. Bernie Sanders demand. But when it comes to legislation, the partisan “budget reconciliation” process will force Senate Democrats to blame each other, not Mr. Biden or irrelevant Republicans. Moderates like Joe Manchin and Kyrsten Sinema will save the president from his party’s excesses and absorb progressive ire for his failure to deliver.

Mr. Biden will happily defend civility, bipartisanship, “pay fors” and other process arguments unlikely to excite anyone outside Washington, rather than referee internal Democratic policy fights. His insistence on passing the first infrastructure bill with 10 Republican votes to overcome the Senate filibuster keeps more-radical policies out of the bill and focuses spending on hard infrastructure like roads and ports, which is popular with voters. Mr. Biden will still get enough green spending to appease center-left voters, but he’ll employ a rope-a-dope strategy with Mr. Sanders’s followers, allowing them to expend their energy pushing congressional Democrats while he offers mild and vague encouragement.
_Read more_**[HERE](http://links.americanxt.com/u/click?_t=45ea7b9dcedb45198104e7ca02a78270&_m=83b299a9f10e4986b140353159a813cb&_e=jzw3eODXxbloNJoK2dp4651BV52Uq3AAB_DIdEZtRGwCC8r1_Qw3Cp1xRfVWkaLMsRfT8EIqN9aeOr4cXRQV2B1U07QosDIG-QiXBgR8ZXigtER5KtmsKj9A-MZRGy9OWYRxwW4LbsTi7lNu6cLd9aVsEdiXv0pcEVX94GptQ2h-OL9FjIwAuc0DRznkeQqN7NbZipJvP7Te-dJ1jGdWi6EKLAUIvRu16sVEaY0MLuXeNcIC3KAE9oWws3c1txajgX7VC0SGw0Hby7cotGGISreQQuz2UPTezwZ5rX6roHbSsLkylIwligWh7v_APB_S0WErMob3qxqBQnfamhyYsQ%3D%3D)**.
|
---

name: Mark Warner
subject: Add your name to support action on climate change
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
With more and more communities finding climate change knocking at their front door, it’s clear the climate crisis is here, and we need real action to help people and communities respond.

|
---

[ ](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32405214/295667937/1995090618?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM2ZThhOC1mOGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4gxyW22jdsoongLMKcipuoMSmlF3iITHmBQUrbl44w=&emci=a937af13-24e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b1c6e8a8-f8e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)

| | Derek, From the record-breaking heat wave that has claimed hundreds of lives in the Pacific Northwest, to the recent floods across Virginia, to an underwater gas leak in the Gulf of Mexico that literally set the ocean ablaze, the events from the first few weeks of this month alone make an urgent case for tackling the climate crisis. With more and more communities finding climate change knocking at their front door, it’s clear the climate crisis is here, and we need real action to help people and communities respond. That’s exactly why I prioritized critical funding for fighting the climate crisis in our bipartisan infrastructure plan. **_[Add your name if you’re with me in the fight for immediate action on climate change.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32405215/295667938/-942173134?ms=mw_em_210714_1&refcode=mw_em_210714_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM2ZThhOC1mOGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4gxyW22jdsoongLMKcipuoMSmlF3iITHmBQUrbl44w=&emci=a937af13-24e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b1c6e8a8-f8e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** Right now, the Senate is working on an infrastructure package that is our best bet to secure the investments we need to upgrade everything from our power grids to electric vehicle production. It includes $47 billion to help communities improve their infrastructure in the face of the climate emergency and $21 billion for important environmental cleanup projects. And I’m proud to be leading the bipartisan discussions to get these priorities over the finish line. **_[We need to act on climate now -- and the infrastructure package is a crucial opportunity. Will you join me in the critical fight to tackle climate change? Sign the petition right now.](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32405216/295667939/-942173134?ms=mw_em_210714_1&refcode=mw_em_210714_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM2ZThhOC1mOGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4gxyW22jdsoongLMKcipuoMSmlF3iITHmBQUrbl44w=&emci=a937af13-24e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b1c6e8a8-f8e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)_** Thanks, Mark Warner **[SIGN THE PETITION](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/32405217/295667940/-942173134?ms=mw_em_210714_1&refcode=mw_em_210714_1&email=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&zip=&firstname=Derek&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiMWM2ZThhOC1mOGU0LWViMTEtYTdhZC01MDFhYzU3YjhmYTciLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=K4gxyW22jdsoongLMKcipuoMSmlF3iITHmBQUrbl44w=&emci=a937af13-24e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&emdi=b1c6e8a8-f8e4-eb11-a7ad-501ac57b8fa7&ceid=4568237)**

name: Deandrea Newsome
subject: re: Erica's first mid-month deadline of Q3
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Erica Smith for US Senate 2022
body:
This goal is too important to fall behind on.
#
Hey y'all! Deandrea here, the campaign chair for Erica Smith for U.S. Senate, with an important campaign update.
**Tomorrow marks Erica's first mid-month fundraising deadline of Q3, and we've set a goal of raising $8,000 — with $0 from corporate PACs or the fossil fuel industry.**
**[Right now, we're $2,369 short, and we don't have much time left to close the gap. Will you chip in $5, $20.08 (our average donation this month), or whatever you can right now?](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5409?refcode=em20210714-260&t=1&akid=260%2E3698%2ECFGxFv)**
**[Contribute](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5409?refcode=em20210714-260&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&akid=260%2E3698%2ECFGxFv)**
**This goal is too important to fall behind on.** Erica is going up against a competitive primary field chock full of well-funded establishment candidates.
And while we've been visiting counties from the mountains to the coast all summer, we still have a TON of work to do to spread Erica's story and our vision for a North Carolina that works for everyone.
Reaching our goal will ensure that a scrappy, insurgent campaign like ours has what it takes to build a large, diverse, working-class coalition that can win this race and transform politics as we know it.
[**So, please, pitch in any amount you can afford today, to put your support behind our movement and help us raise $2,369 before midnight tomorrow.**](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5409?refcode=em20210714-260&t=21&akid=260%2E3698%2ECFGxFv)
Let's do this!!!
[](https://act.ericaforus.com/go/5409?refcode=em20210714-260&t=22&akid=260%2E3698%2ECFGxFv)
Deandrea
Deandrea Newsome
Campaign Chair
Erica Smith for U.S. Senate

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/es-emails?refcode=em20210714-260-footer&t=23&refcode2=260_3698_CFGxFv&akid=260%2E3698%2ECFGxFv)**
---
Email us: [info@ericaforus.com](mailto: info@ericaforus.com)
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Grassroots donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Erica for Us, P.O. Box 1236, Gaston, NC 27832.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.ericaforus.com/signup/did-your-information-change/?t=24&akid=260%2E3698%2ECFGxFv)

name: Big Tech Watch (Team LaHood)
subject: [Alert] President Trump is suing Big Tech
disclaimer_text: Paid for by LaHood for Congress |
body:
When Big Tech banned President Trump, they were sending a message to conservatives... | |
---
[](http://links.lahoodforcongress.com/u/click?_t=d5887efe66684ada97976ef2e9d70137&_m=f0446b3b0a744e24be84f6952763c374&_e=jrdwEXhS-EiRQuuAEIZ_AJayb0i6R-YDk9ZSLsiL4-VtHGPC6jdDl1Sy5tB8xEN5AtP_rqoCs10I9GYDXh1a0WyHy4nBxd_av8JEiCWU6QE9jOB3zm6JV9l2lIThwEdRyfUzR6rFuGqwk1A3C6p7jovvRXEjgDnQgHalQ5os413LlAdt_tN8x-GnJYCbbm0kKrw6Z4kKeygUAiMpYbtNw_YFPJEJdnyx66iL1nRRFzQYlK-Z6DhBzwELk5zbU5RbkUDKZy8vaBXyMmSyIOIWWmQdnAmOBmJ2kQ6aHUP3Km8ssJCSzuSaWpo-w0XbxxI225yZxuWhKDzvAXr0LcD5yJOVMOYsqp0khtGiPJ6rPaXN5KHXI1DhCm_LrtNuw9rhOmcz7EonLhhS9yhs8B5IX5nc4AfEpCJxCDwK9i5eRd7paDVZa_SDYnff1RzP5XvpaujNaoeoQUVDuuw4agpFk_atz73iqZAk35eKK01e1fY%3D)
|
---
Friendーhave you heard the latest news?

**President Trump is suing Facebook, Google, and Twitter for their deplatforming practices and influence on our elections! **

NOW, extremist Republicans are following Arizona's lead by pushing sham "election audits" in battleground states across the country – all so they can undermine our democracy, steal the election and rig the system so Democrats can never win again. Concerned Americans everywhere are urgently speaking out against this assault on our democracy, but with time running out before our poll closes at midnight, we're still missing your response. So please, Friend, let us know where you stand NOW: WILL YOU CONDEMN THE ARIZONA GOP'S SHAM "ELECTION AUDIT" AND DEFEND OUR DEMOCRACY? | | | | DEADLINE: 11:59 P.M. | COMPLETION RATE IN 18326: 98.9% | RESPONSE PENDING Thank you for making your voice heard. – Team Lopez Please read on for a personal message from Democrat Marco Lopez:** Friend, I’m so grateful you’re part of our people-powered movement to flip Arizona blue. But I have to be honest: I’m counting on your help now more than ever. I’m a proud Democrat, former border city mayor and Obama administration alum – and I’m running for governor to build a state that works for all our people. But failed GOP politicians like Kelli Ward and Doug Ducey are spreading delusional conspiracy theories and putting Donald Trump’s interests ahead of what’s best for our state. Enough is enough. But with Arizona slated to be the nation's TOP battleground in 2022, Republicans are gearing up to spend MILLIONS to keep the governorship red, so we’ll only win this race with overwhelming grassroots support. If you’re with me, = Thank you so much. – Marco Lopez | | | = | This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Hello — I cannot stress enough the significance of the next few weeks. Democrats were able to make tremendous investments through the American Rescue Plan. Those included so many critical programs, from the expanded Child Tax Credit that 95% of New Mexican families are eligible for, to over $3 million in vouchers for New Mexicans experiencing homelessness and victims of domestic violence. Now we need to finish that work through the bipartisan infrastructure package and budget reconciliation. It’s really a once-in-a-generation opportunity to rebuild our infrastructure, act on climate, and more. | Did you see what is currently happening in the Texas Legislature? Democrats in the Texas State House actually fled the state to avoid having to debate election integrity bills. They grabbed a case of beer and hopped on private jets, claiming they were making a "sacrifice" by refusing to do their jobs. And where did they go? Washington, D.C.

This is absolutely ridiculous. These Democrats are paid to serve in the state legislature, yet they are refusing to even show up and do their job. All because they don't want to ensure the integrity of future elections.

Now, Vice President Kamala Harris is praising the Democrats and saying their actions show "courage."**_Give me a break._**

I've spent my entire life taking on challenges. Whether it was as a cadet at West Point, as a cavalry officer in the U.S. Army or as President Trump's Secretary of State, I've never run away when the going got tough. Yet that's exactly what these Democrats in Texas are doing. They are refusing to do their jobs, and it is truly pathetic.

_We join public service to serve the people, not flee when the going gets tough._ This is why it is so important that grassroot conservatives across the country do everything we can to help principled Republicans win in the upcoming elections. That's exactly what we are doing through my organization, CAVPAC.

We are calling the Democrats out for their absurd actions and dangerous policies, while supporting America First conservatives all across the country who are standing up to the radical Left. **[Can you chip in to help us stop the radical Left?](http://links.reclamingamericanfreedom.com/u/click?_t=5ec072595b1347f09b4bac0de82ea87d&_m=a16894c7f40b498aa9499242c0ef4730&_e=lq1K-klh0KAjf1BG6zj2Sa1d8IIumM-R9UQk8S9AijkRKHfhiXbzZj_Y4SK-uNsWP8cvtn2xfmHb_i855QWtpwSw2riu6VtKwmG1iT5TG3Px_T9kmsCVguf1uSMVdmMVspI6_2OTlHWe572O3nCmBcym3g1HHFqVci_2I_cJ4PHitCv85AikQvnV67jfXd7yjmTd8wWKYByu0grBES9s1G2iJiQqUpPwT8TG2O-Um9eQV1HsJPffaYwnXoHg-i3kXGeUhD4_prZzfhnjijJ8yifEq-Er88x4zgx5spn9wJTeDk-VFztW9u3LQC3YnXehe0XvcxVNx7sKtXzbl6cFgz9n_DfAkgZWHmkLIfO1rhu1yEXoBj9Q6tnu2n_eghLKm5wnagk1h-U1zO1qKtezXvIERRp8hu7OPxmCW3PIYwpVfSdDeXd0J0Ux5brqkoAD0jJjwEoBbXM_97jZtzuCKzdghwoJKayuwlxX0kkpde6BduC2bdswL7N7k9VqjY5hpN-O8P4NrBXt6Nc-kBsNhg%3D%3D "Can you chip in to help us stop the radical Left?")**

Yet that's exactly what these Democrats in Texas are doing. They are refusing to do their jobs, and it is truly pathetic. We join public service to serve the people, not flee when the going gets tough. This is why it is so important that grassroot conservatives across the country do everything we can to help principled Republicans win in the upcoming elections. That's exactly what we are doing through my organization, CAVPAC. We are calling the Democrats out for their absurd actions and dangerous policies, while supporting America First conservatives all across the country who are standing up to the radical Left. "Can you chip in to help us stop the radical Left?" I know it is frustrating to watch what Democrats are trying to do to our country, but we cannot grow discouraged or give up. The future of our country is far too important. Please consider "making a donation to CAVPAC" to help us push to victory candidates who support election integrity and who won't give an inch to the radical Left. Any amount you can give could be the difference in success or failure in the upcoming elections. | | Let's send a clear message to Kamala Harris and the Democrats in Texas that the American people DO NOT support their silly antics and extremist agenda. We want our elected leaders to do their job and secure our elections. Fighting for our future, | Mike Pompeo PS: Please forward this to 5 of your friends and family to make sure everyone knows about the ridiculous antics of the radical Left! | | | | | | | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | ---|--- | PAID FOR BY CHAMPION AMERICAN VALUES. name: Team Kilmer
subject: If our democracy isn't working for the people -- then it's not really working
disclaimer_text: Paid for by People for Derek Kilmer
body:
**" Fourteen states have enacted 22 new laws making it harder to vote"** The right to vote is under attack, Peter. Derek is working to reform our democracy so it works for the people, and expanding access to the ballot box and rooting out corruption is at the top of the list. **[Join Derek in this fight by adding your name today.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HrhJ-M9EHbYTUHa37aDCDrWvTMaCG2DWYev6aQb2akg=/n_gJh2f8n4AAb4B3xBEcVOzsuhfKW-BNKwp3MJdh4xA=)**
---
| Peter,

After Democrats took back control of the White House and the Senate and held our majority in the House, Republican state legislators across the country decided to wage a war on the right to vote.

In 2021 alone, more than 385 new laws have been proposed in 48 states to limit mail-in voting, early in-person, and Election Day voting. **Twenty-two of these voter suppression bills have already become law; Congress must act before any more are enacted.**

It's simple: if our democracy isn't working for the people -- then it's not really working at all. That's why Derek is working hard to pass legislation to expand access to the ballot box, reduce big money in politics, and root out corruption in Washington.

**[If you're for the people in this fight, will you add your name now calling on Congress to support democracy reform? Take action with Derek today to protect and reform our democracy.](https://act.myngp.com/el/HrhJ-M9EHbYTUHa37aDCDrWvTMaCG2DWYev6aQb2akg=/n_gJh2f8n4AAb4B3xBEcVOzsuhfKW-BNKwp3MJdh4xA=)**

Thank you,
