name: VOTING RIGHTS ATTACKED (via DCCC)
subject: do you stand with Texas Democrats?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the DCCC | 430 South Capitol Street SE, Washington, DC 20003 | [(202) 863-1500](http://dccc
body:
Will you take our 3O second survey and let us know if you SUPPORT Texas Democrats in their fight against Republican voter suppression? >> | | | | **DO YOU STAND WITH TEXAS DEMOCRATS?**

Dozens of INCREDIBLE Texas Democrats just left the state in an effort to stop the latest Republican voter suppression bill from going into a vote.

We're so proud of them \-- but Democratic HQ needs to know if you have their backs.**

So will you take our 3O-second survey and let us know if you SUPPORT Texas Democrats in their fight against Republican voter suppression? >>**
---
[YES! ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-) | | [NO ->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)
---|---|---

We're so proud to be Democrats right now.

**After Texas Republicans tried to ram through the latest voter suppression bill, dozens of INCREDIBLE Democratic lawmakers left the state and stopped the bill in its tracks.**

But now Republicans are _**LIVID**_ \-- and they're willing to do whatever it takes to continue their attacks on our voting rights.

The Trump-endorsed governor has even threatened to ARREST the Democrats for leaving the state and ruining his schemes!

**Make no mistake: The brave Texas Democrats have put SO much at risk to defend voting rights and protect our democracy from Republican voter suppression in Texas and across the country.**

So now, Democratic HQ needs to know if our very best grassroots Democrats support this bold move to defend our voting rights.
**[BEFORE MIDNIGHT: Will you take our 3O-second survey and let us know if you SUPPORT Texas Democrats in their fight against Republican voter suppression?>>](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/er4dfwg6_)**
| **[YES!->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/wm-)** | | **[NO->](https://links.e.dccc.org/els/v2/z7-)**
---|---|---
****

Thanks,

DCCC

name: Parents Against Critical Theory
subject: The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Parents Against Critical Theory
body:
"They're not trying to educate; they're trying to indoctrinate." \- Ron DeSantis

| [ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57937363:JPXrpflWN:m:1:3253819041:342CB13CB6A00882CC0A940FCC086931:r)
---
Peter,

The teachers union are declaring war on our children and our country.

**[_Over the weekend, the nation's largest teachers union (the NEA) approved a plan to promote Critical Race Theory in ALL 50 states and over 14,000 local school districts._](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57937363:JPXrpflWN:m:1:3253819041:342CB13CB6A00882CC0A940FCC086931:r)**

**Eliminating CRT is THE most important issue of our time.** The leftists have control over Hollywood, higher education, and the news. If they brainwash our children with progressive propaganda, America will cease to be America.

**LOOK AT WHAT THEY ARE TEACHING KINDERGARTNERS:**

[ ](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57937363:JPXrpflWN:m:1:3253819041:342CB13CB6A00882CC0A940FCC086931:r)
**_[Please DONATE NOW to stand with Parents Against Critical Theory as we FIGHT BACK against the Critical Race Theory and the teachers unions. We can 't do it without grassroots supporters like YOU! >>](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57937363:JPXrpflWN:m:1:3253819041:342CB13CB6A00882CC0A940FCC086931:r)_**

**Critical Race Theory teaches that "whiteness" is evil, that parents are "dissenters," and that ALL white people are "oppressors."**

_The Left might've gone off the rails, but we can't let them drag our children down with them._ This is more important than any election. Parents Against Critical Theory will not rest until CRT has been COMPLETELY defeated.

**But we need your help, Peter.** As we like to say, _" We're so grassroots, we need our grass-cut!"_ We truly do rely on the generosity of American Patriots like YOU.

**Will you join us and fight for objective curriculum in our children's schools?**

**[DONATE HERE to help us DEFEAT Critical Race Theory> >](http://email.vervemail.com/ct/57937363:JPXrpflWN:m:1:3253819041:342CB13CB6A00882CC0A940FCC086931:r)**

Sincerely,

name: Pramila Jayapal HQ
subject: NEW: Medicare expansion is IN Senate package
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pramila for Congress
body:
Pramila’s tireless leadership made this possible.
#
Peter,
This is huge (or ‘yuge’ like our friend Bernie Sanders would say)!
| **Erik Wasson** @elwasson
---|---
| | | BREAKING: Senate Democrats agree on $3.5 trillion budget reconciliation bill including Medicare expansion
---
Pramila and Bernie have been fighting for Medicare for All for years — and that fight will continue. But they have also been leading the charge to expand Medicare as part of the American Families Plan. **And _just now_ ,** President Biden and Senate Democrats have agreed to pass a historic public health care expansion that will get more people covered AND get more people on Medicare the health care they need.
[**This isn’t over, and we need to keep up the momentum to make it the law of the land. Can you chip in to fuel our fight for Medicare expansion today, and for Medicare for All in the days ahead?**](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210714?refcode=em20210714-463&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=19&refcode2=463_420207__aMf_7&akid=463%2E420207%2E_aMf_7)
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210714?refcode=em20210714-463&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=20&refcode2=463_420207__aMf_7&akid=463%2E420207%2E_aMf_7)**
We know a full 70% of Democrats in the House, including folks in tough re-election fights, support expanding Medicare, improving benefits, and lowering prescription drug costs because it’s good policy — but also because we want to show people across America that we’ve delivered for them.
**Now, thanks to our organizing, we know that the Senate Democratic Caucus is on board, too.** Opening Medicare to millions of new folks gets people care who didn’t have it before, improving benefits, and lowering prescription costs can help people finally get the medicine they need to survive.
Again, here’s what we are fighting to win in this next huge Democratic bill:
* **Lowering the Medicare eligibility age:** This would immediately extend coverage to 23 million people, including many who lost insurance during the pandemic.
* **Improving Medicare benefits to finally cover dental, vision, and hearing care, and cap out-of-pocket costs:** This will give folks on Medicare much needed coverage to see the dentist, get hearing aids, and afford a new pair of glasses.
* **Empower Medicare to negotiate drug prices for everyone:** The U.S. spends far more than any other country on prescription drugs, despite Medicare Part D being the largest purchaser. We need the government to use its power to negotiate drug prices down for everyone.

These are widely popular measures and President Biden promised to deliver on them. Medicare for All is our end goal, and Pramila will never stop leading the fight for it. But as we continue building our movement, we can pass this transformative Medicare expansion plan right away.
Fewer people will struggle without care, fewer people will struggle to get hearing aids and critical dental care, and fewer people will have to ration their insulin or go without the medicine they need.
**[Now is NOT the time to let up. Chip in $3 right now to keep pushing for the transformational change we need. We must ensure Medicare expansion becomes law and the fight for true universal single-payer health care continues.](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210714?refcode=em20210714-463&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&refcode2=463_420207__aMf_7&akid=463%2E420207%2E_aMf_7)**
**[Chip in $3](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-20210714?refcode=em20210714-463&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=22&refcode2=463_420207__aMf_7&akid=463%2E420207%2E_aMf_7)**
In solidarity,
Team Jayapal

**[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pj-email-footer?refcode=em20210714-463-footer&t=23&refcode2=463_420207__aMf_7&akid=463%2E420207%2E_aMf_7)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/pramila.jayapal) | [](https://twitter.com/pramilajayapal) | [](https://www.instagram.com/pramilajayapal/)
Email us: info@pramilaforcongress.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, and small-dollar contributions sustain our movement for transformative change. To contribute by check, please address to Pramila for Congress, PO Box 21912, Seattle, WA 98111.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/signup/did-your-info-change/?t=24&akid=463%2E420207%2E_aMf_7)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.pramilaforcongress.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=25&akid=463%2E420207%2E_aMf_7)

Paid for by Pramila for Congress

name: =?utf-8?Q?Team=20IN=20GOP?=
subject: TX Democrats run away
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
Democrat lawmakers in Texas are fleeing the state. Sound familiar? | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-470690?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=440fdd4543&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Stop me if you’ve heard this before: Democrat lawmakers are fleeing the state after not getting their way. The only difference between what happened here in Indiana 10 years ago and now, is that this time it’s happening in Texas!

Democrats in Texas aren’t happy that Republicans want to ensure election security and integrity. So, history is repeating itself. Instead of debating the issue on the floor, they decided to hop in a luxury private plane and jet off to Washington DC!

Of course, they stopped off and bought some Miller Lite before fleeing town. Priorities.

Hoosier Republican, we’ve seen this behavior before. When the radical left doesn’t get their way, they run and hide.

**Someone should tell Texas Democrats that after Democrats pulled that stunt here, Hoosiers handed legislative supermajorities to Republicans**.

_**Supermajorities we’ve held ever since! **_

Stand with us by [**rushing a contribution right now**](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=2280600893&e=1acd9bb3d6) to ensure Democrat temper-tantrums don’t happen here again.

**The Indiana Republican Party is proud to be the party of freedom, law and order, and common sense in our state**.

Dedicated Hoosier Republicans like Governor Holcomb, our party leadership, and the entire Republican caucus continue to strive for excellence by providing the utmost constituent services and, above all, doing our job to serve YOU in the Indiana legislature.

\- Team Indiana GOP
---
|
---

clean_body: Democrat lawmakers in Texas are fleeing the state. Sound familiar? | | | | | | Hoosier Republican, Stop me if you’ve heard this before: Democrat lawmakers are fleeing the state after not getting their way. The only difference between what happened here in Indiana 10 years ago and now, is that this time it’s happening in Texas! Democrats in Texas aren’t happy that Republicans want to ensure election security and integrity. So, history is repeating itself. Instead of debating the issue on the floor, they decided to hop in a luxury private plane and jet off to Washington DC! Of course, they stopped off and bought some Miller Lite before fleeing town. Priorities. Hoosier Republican, we’ve seen this behavior before. When the radical left doesn’t get their way, they run and hide. Someone should tell Texas Democrats that after Democrats pulled that stunt here, Hoosiers handed legislative supermajorities to Republicans. Supermajorities we’ve held ever since! Stand with us by to ensure Democrat temper-tantrums don’t happen here again. The Indiana Republican Party is proud to be the party of freedom, law and order, and common sense in our state. Dedicated Hoosier Republicans like Governor Holcomb, our party leadership, and the entire Republican caucus continue to strive for excellence by providing the utmost constituent services and, above all, doing our job to serve YOU in the Indiana legislature. \- Team Indiana GOP | | | | | | | | | | | | | Copyright © 2021 Indiana Republican State Committee, Inc., All rights reserved.

name: John Fetterman
subject: Two hundred and fifty thousand!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Fetterman for PA
body:
We’re 96% of the way toward a major goal, and I need your help right now to put us over the line.
# [](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/388?refcode=em20210714-2002-header&t=1&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)
Peter, this is absolutely nuts.
We are like two centimeters away from being the first Senate challenger of this election to hit a _maaaaajor_ milestone.
**250,000 grassroots donations.** Nobody else has reported being this close. We're like 96% of the way there.
**Here's what I'm thinking. I would love to cross this goal line before our mid-month fundraising deadline at midnight tomorrow, July 15.** Based on the number of people who usually read my emails, we need exactly 1 out of every 8 people reading this message now to donate as little as $1. If that happens, we'd hit the goal in a matter of hours and break a record for this election cycle.
Will you be one of those people I can count on?
[**_Let me know if you can help us cross 250,000 before the mid-month deadline. Contribute $1 — or literally whatever amount you can afford — because the next few donations could put us over the line._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22204?refcode=em20210714-2002&t=2&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)
**[Contribute $1](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22204?refcode=em20210714-2002&t=4&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)**
I'm so freaking excited that I asked the tech crew if we could put up a live thermometer. It should update in real time every 15 mins or so... here's where we’re at:
[](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22204?refcode=em20210714-2002&t=5&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)
This matters, Peter. It matters because when I first ran to serve in public office it was hard to rub two nickels together for a campaign. It matters because — unfortunately — the amount of money you raise for a campaign more often than not has a big impact on whether or not you win.
Our dudes in the GOP are going to throw the kitchen sink at us to keep this Senate seat in Republican hands. But we can compete precisely because we have so many grassroots supporters who believe in this campaign — from every single one of PA's 67 counties. 💪 The 250,000 contribution milestone is a big, big reminder of that. And I'd love to hit it before our deadline.
[**_So, can you help us hit 250,000 before tomorrow's midnight deadline on July 15? Even just $1 would go a long ways to helping do that._**](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22204?refcode=em20210714-2002&t=6&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)
**[Contribute $1](https://act.johnfetterman.com/go/22204?refcode=em20210714-2002&t=8&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)**
I get emotional thinking about how many of you are putting skin in the game to win this race. I will never forget that when we make it to the Senate. I'll never forget that the grassroots put me there.
John
John Fetterman
Lieutenant Governor of Pennsylvania

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jf-emails?refcode=em20210714-2002-footer&t=9&refcode2=2002_434096_d2veyk&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)**
---
[](https://www.facebook.com/JohnFettermanPA/) | [](https://twitter.com/johnfetterman) | [](https://www.instagram.com/johnfetterman/)
Email us: info@johnfetterman.com
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way we keep in touch with people like you, so thank you for reading to the end. Small donors like you keep us going. To contribute via check, please address to Fetterman for PA, PO Box 6061, Pittsburgh PA 15211.
* [Receive Fewer Emails](https://act.johnfetterman.com/signup/receive-fewer-emails/)
* [Update My Personal Information](https://act.johnfetterman.com/sign/personal_info/?t=10&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)
* [Unsubscribe](https://act.johnfetterman.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=11&akid=2002%2E434096%2Ed2veyk)

Paid for by Fetterman for PA.

body:
I was on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | [](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9cXgrhUDzOk23wfzdwub_nQ8knJ7xhNYzNkoCf3EYg2y8qe8xDaSLQR6vw10s3Xqqb6Vtt-w0TDr2CgQzmB8YxvgM-PeKqcXED1F6ThRKSyBvfBnTDRzrDoICYXFD9IWf-a7Sx7UtgjiFxoYJ-dAd4qU-ndCqzq8oUa1ud1PvARbXiPULRH53KrRsaKmo8bsLj_kfZ31grB-fiL4BmCH06k%3D)

Fellow Conservative,

My name is Alek Skarlatos and I'm asking for just a couple moments of your time today as I work to re-introduce myself to conservatives around the nation.

This is my story.

I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. **We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all.**

As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day.

Last year I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality long ago. **My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism** , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need.

Recently, I launched my second campaign for Congress and **[I need your help to fill our campaign accounts which we were forced to empty entirely last fall](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9UjkH2P5CjB5oNv11RSaX3WQerlUOgyAPg5hIWycclOBWeF8f1eH-N1MO0ALUvgmqzTPuWOnBLiDHB5oWRWYufeV-4ldXaGxkqgleKDrskTnKUt72iQ4cEsPAjvTHK_khSxpxNKnFNDRP5BIGl1OYZ9qI7aRxQ46_LMa8MmhcXu9ATZpOZElpTshhSPRFTr3WN1_hcDKvwy1IkUiSqsgC2I%3D)**.

| [**Please Help Refill My Campaign Account** **› › **](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9WYCao7zjctQvTG_7rvMfZcJtavKFeaY1KGoO2TxSNyTI6YY7hAhkmGnPE07KBFjh2u0Q68mYB9JOYgShXozrPwBoKMO2QjiUUNRpybBND1Kw2a-KoWGvlnCWYi6YJc9BDMASAcCPBnS4lE4mzIbsvKkCj8CBso24er2ySw9j4wBxV06Q4AJx3U_UEgQ2OsOhck7--BTJdUAnlbOExG-NiA%3D)
---

Republicans are on the cusp of flipping the House - we only need a net gain of six seats - **[simply put, there is no way I can't sit on the sidelines and not do my part, so I'm challenging Peter DeFazio once again.](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9RY9qOVstnT62VKmm2njAMMin5rizdBugL7UJOxv3OXuW-S2jIASqUmWFjZjFNYgTiPH76HGqAQ3HJdtWqpSHhz-1uePQlvwoD74N5h1wvfC-bOnfv_rH9BPSA4TZmTD-qzFQLCwlSVLaIbJKYEQwIEhXlnkg66q4T7uk6qjt3OoULi1jCiweM95YDtcrQ-zsOpLAbGLV6Y6oSY9dhSlF-s%3D)**

Will you please consider a gift of $5, $10, $25, or even $100 today to help me get my congressional campaign off the ground? **Right now I have $1,000 in our account, and that isn't going to get me anywhere.**

Following the events of that day on the Paris-bound train, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film _The 15:17 to Paris,_ **directed by Clint Eastwood.**

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9Rc02J_3VKIoxtYYmEPxtJIv9iEMIw0wdW3Bh0xD0PtU_9-DXm0AQMZzojQ0p0PRFZdSA9TtVMLzgbbz-18Ix8Ftm2d3ytxb5x25NE4dyYVJuldgvt1PtTzVL8kLaSkZ-i2K4_yxDVK5ITFoNMEVJg-U08pJvXiUByaOQHCFBpOx-7j-eK4py4M5js7QX8TQAhscidi9-VyNqqfkPpReA08%3D)Anthony Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California.
But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – **I did it out of duty.** And now, duty is calling me again.

I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why **I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington.**

[**Will you lend your support to my fight by chipping in $10, $25, $50 or another amount today?**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9Rnsx9UWuAZZkNV9sM-BrXoSlJTI-xgsBHOSCYU8vUu-CxkVqf_yFuOY2DhRh3gY0mwlRHvZuzgzinKw2DIWcymqC2KMNnnMix7Y6t58fwtiK6IdZ2iXiPJ9n-z8JYk-8Y3tmM4X4NSh69ciHcyBM5yr1CIFo97o4rmzE3p_SwhLeNjDbu_SlkUxO3Vz59YjycqL-9KrXW4nfCtzYoCa8tg%3D)

My Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio has prioritized his Washington “values” and radical-socialist colleagues over the constituents of my Oregon community for too long.

DeFazio has received an “F” rating from the National Rifle Association and he vehemently supports the outrageous Green New Deal. His stance on these two issues alone **do not align with our district or with our country.**

I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of my opponent and his radical-Left allies.

**I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear.** The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them.

[](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9ehV-C3hJkOz5cAkk8YVWp3XqG8O29u7NbtTjfHI-H4unwj4IhruIYrl8cxyXZ3A7LCypa36yajmySOCQPS-Ins0N1foUNo1t8qGYgZk8JacS0OToSqYgZRa1ALpzpBjF88XVsFqDc01XK9BxYiJ0_UhbyjLP1NRodcT-538iV1dns2LBXkqnXFcEfLBMTPyJT9dL1AtkkrpvJkp9SasWLk%3D)

My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. [**I am taking that mission and putting it into action by running for Congress, by fighting for my neighbors and their wellbeing in Washington.**](http://links.ourdefenseofamerica.com/u/click?_t=aa3ef0db03454a26b650c9ca7e919386&_m=d084d4f5a9ab492ea7eacdc8598ff051&_e=dfM98Mn0Y5KwhcFyrnH2GaESAKO96QaDNomLFh_WoxnHeyFviDtra9Y7VQJc3aUIhE89Rw7bS70OorONzq9ulbxQTiFdTSZZo2K2kpN6DfsAUIZmnhmmK3RoIH_hql_osDJtlecrj1Kyly-cYzgxhLPp5_xhpDsZwTuB0xdNrQL3TD3WBPHA2gBKEFci_jqBrK-G4jgrKYdyRuZ9N0jge88UPUqAWwuSVe5p-_7mltTK-tRi4heMuw5S2PK_ci63Zkkfrib9sa2zQ5xrRxNB9YuzKKDmQraeGbyQGRrnWITOfEADosuTCWESWzhejHt33Ouv-p1GsNjBR4RlN7LrPXu88GWzIw6CetdR6fyg5RKPfoFMkqb6rTjnjH3iRfs7C5a3o-txzYCqtEDhZJ_b_VLRgJWbdjTCPL71vgA-8wKRIoEX9lGWNmEFByxg2wEuWAfWzlpFN28SwXNwqWAfq3ph9FwrNz884vIulHqhg0E%3D)

This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. clean_body: I was on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take I stopped a terrortist attack on a train to Paris, now I'm ready to serve the great state of Oregon in Congress. | Fellow Conservative, My name is Alek Skarlatos and I'm asking for just a couple moments of your time today as I work to re-introduce myself to conservatives around the nation. This is my story. I had just finished serving our great nation in Afghanistan when I decided to take a vacation with my two childhood friends in Europe during 2015. We were traveling on a Paris-bound train when an Islamic terrorist armed with a gun, a jar of gasoline, and 270 rounds of ammunition attempted to take over our train and kill us all. As a soldier, I was trained to take out a terrorist threat - as an American, I was taught to stand up for freedom no matter where I was in the world. Which is why along with my friends and other brave travelers took the action needed to stop the terrorist that day. Last year I ran for Congress because, like a lot of you reading this email, my congressman lost touch with reality long ago. My life changed the day my friends and I took on Islamic terrorism , and since then I've made a habit of standing up and speaking out when I know there is a need. Recently, I launched my second campaign for Congress and . | Republicans are on the cusp of flipping the House - we only need a net gain of six seats - Will you please consider a gift of $5, $10, $25, or even $100 today to help me get my congressional campaign off the ground? Right now I have $1,000 in our account, and that isn't going to get me anywhere. Following the events of that day on the Paris-bound train, the President awarded me the United States Army's Soldier's Medal, and the events of that fateful day were later retold in the film The 15:17 to Paris, directed by Clint Eastwood. Sadler, Spencer Stone, and I accepting the Hero Award from Clint Eastwood on June 4, 2016, in California. But I didn’t do what I did to receive recognition – I did it out of duty. And now, duty is calling me again. I have seen the dangers of this world, and I have stood up for freedom in the face of terrorism. I know the strength it takes to stand up and fight for what is right - which is why I want to take on the anti-American, radical-Left in Washington. My Democrat opponent, Peter DeFazio has prioritized his Washington “values” and radical-socialist colleagues over the constituents of my Oregon community for too long. DeFazio has received an “F” rating from the National Rifle Association and he vehemently supports the outrageous Green New Deal. His stance on these two issues alone do not align with our district or with our country. I am committed to restoring conservative leadership to this district. Southern Oregon’s economy has wasted away due to the Leftist control of my opponent and his radical-Left allies. I am running for Congress to represent the loggers, veterans, moms, dads and families that hold the American dream dear. The constituents of Oregon’s 4th district are hard-workers who have fought to make ends-meet under the Leftist leadership that has only hindered them. My life’s mission has always been to represent the America I know and love - the world’s bastion of freedom and economic prosperity. This will not be an easy road, which is why I am reaching out to you. I will need the financial support of every American patriot; every single dollar will help. Thank you, Alek Skarlatos Republican for Congress | Alek is a former Oregon National Guardsman, completing a nine-month deployment in Afghanistan. Alek, along with four others, stopped an armed terrorist on a Paris-bound train traveling from Amsterdam to Paris in August 2015. His heroism earned him several awards and medals around the world. ---|--- | ---|--- Alek Skarlatos is a former Oregon National Guardsman. Friend,

**_As the people of Cuba fight for their freedom, let’s not forget that House Democrats support the same Socialist policies that have devastated the Cuban people for a generation._**
